1→{
     2→  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
     3→  "$id": "system-build-handoff.schema.json",
     4→  "title": "Versioned exact-13 system build handoff",
     5→  "description": "C14 output. The handoff pins every source artifact and the pre-handoff manifest. To avoid a digest cycle, its own SHA-256 and the final manifest digest are stored only by staging-manifest.json; neither value is embedded here.",
     6→  "type": "object",
     7→  "additionalProperties": false,
     8→  "required": [
     9→    "schema_version",
    10→    "kind",
    11→    "identity",
    12→    "source_inputs",
    13→    "source_manifest",
    14→    "digest_contract",
    15→    "execution_tasks",
    16→    "registration_request"
    17→  ],
    18→  "properties": {
    19→    "schema_version": {
    20→      "const": "1.0.0"
    21→    },
    22→    "kind": {
    23→      "const": "system-build-handoff"
    24→    },
    25→    "identity": {
    26→      "type": "object",
    27→      "additionalProperties": false,
    28→      "required": [
    29→        "repository_id",
    30→        "feature_id",
    31→        "feature_package_id",
    32→        "parent_feature",
    33→        "source_feature_digest"
    34→      ],
    35→      "properties": {
    36→        "repository_id": {
    37→          "type": "string",
    38→          "minLength": 1
    39→        },
    40→        "feature_id": {
    41→          "type": "string",
    42→          "minLength": 1,
    43→          "description": "The invoking dev-graph feature id; C14 enforces equality with parent_feature."
    44→        },
    45→        "feature_package_id": {
    46→          "type": "string",
    47→          "pattern": "^feature-package/[A-Za-z0-9._/-]+$"
    48→        },
    49→        "parent_feature": {
    50→          "type": "string",
    51→          "minLength": 1
    52→        },
    53→        "source_feature_digest": {
    54→          "type": "string",
    55→          "pattern": "^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"
    56→        }
    57→      }
    58→    },
    59→    "source_inputs": {
    60→      "type": "array",
    61→      "minItems": 16,
    62→      "maxItems": 16,
    63→      "uniqueItems": true,
    64→      "description": "Exact ordered source set: package, inventory, graph, and P01..P13 task specs. The manifest is pinned separately as source_manifest.",
    65→      "prefixItems": [
    66→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "feature-package.json"}}}]},
    67→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "workstream-inventory.json"}}}]},
    68→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-graph.json"}}}]},
    69→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-01-requirements.md"}}}]},
    70→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-02-architecture.md"}}}]},
    71→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-03-design-review.md"}}}]},
    72→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-04-test-design.md"}}}]},
    73→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-05-implementation.md"}}}]},
    74→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-06-test-run.md"}}}]},
    75→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-07-acceptance.md"}}}]},
    76→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-08-refactoring-migration.md"}}}]},
    77→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-09-quality-assurance.md"}}}]},
    78→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-10-final-review.md"}}}]},
    79→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-11-evidence.md"}}}]},
    80→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-12-documentation-operations.md"}}}]},
    81→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/digested_path"}, {"properties": {"path": {"const": "task-specs/phase-13-release-deploy.md"}}}]}
    82→      ],
    83→      "items": false
    84→    },
    85→    "source_manifest": {
    86→      "type": "object",
    87→      "additionalProperties": false,
    88→      "required": [
    89→        "path",
    90→        "sha256_before_handoff",
    91→        "canonical_digest_before_handoff"
    92→      ],
    93→      "properties": {
    94→        "path": {
    95→          "const": "staging-manifest.json"
    96→        },
    97→        "sha256_before_handoff": {
    98→          "type": "string",
    99→          "pattern": "^[0-9a-f]{64}$"
   100→        },
   101→        "canonical_digest_before_handoff": {
   102→          "type": "string",
   103→          "pattern": "^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"
   104→        }
   105→      }
   106→    },
   107→    "digest_contract": {
   108→      "type": "object",
   109→      "additionalProperties": false,
   110→      "required": [
   111→        "algorithm",
   112→        "source_digest_scope",
   113→        "handoff_digest_location",
   114→        "final_manifest_digest_scope",
   115→        "self_reference_policy"
   116→      ],
   117→      "properties": {
   118→        "algorithm": {"const": "sha256"},
   119→        "source_digest_scope": {"const": "source_inputs only; handoff and manifest excluded"},
   120→        "handoff_digest_location": {"const": "staging-manifest.json#files/system-build-handoff.json"},
   121→        "final_manifest_digest_scope": {"const": "all manifest files including handoff; manifest itself excluded"},
   122→        "self_reference_policy": {"const": "handoff omits its own digest and final manifest digest"}
   123→      }
   124→    },
   125→    "execution_tasks": {
   126→      "type": "array",
   127→      "minItems": 13,
   128→      "maxItems": 13,
   129→      "items": {
   130→        "type": "object",
   131→        "additionalProperties": false,
   132→        "required": ["task_id", "phase_ref", "task_spec_path", "build_target_kind", "depends_on"],
   133→        "properties": {
   134→          "task_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
   135→          "phase_ref": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^P(0[1-9]|1[0-3])$"},
   136→          "task_spec_path": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^task-specs/phase-[0-9]{2}-[A-Za-z0-9-]+\\.md$"},
   137→          "build_target_kind": {
   138→            "enum": ["application-code", "skill", "sub-agent", "slash-command", "hook", "script", "documentation", "infrastructure", "data-migration"]
   139→          },
   140→          "depends_on": {
   141→            "type": "array",
   142→            "uniqueItems": true,
   143→            "items": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}
   144→          }
   145→        }
   146→      }
   147→    },
   148→    "registration_request": {
   149→      "type": "object",
   150→      "additionalProperties": false,
   151→      "required": ["path", "owner", "consumer", "status", "promotion_receipt", "registration_receipt"],
   152→      "properties": {
   153→        "path": {"const": "dev-graph-registration.json"},
   154→        "owner": {"const": "system-dev-planner/C11"},
   155→        "consumer": {"const": "dev-graph/C02"},
   156→        "status": {"const": "deferred-until-promotion"},
   157→        "promotion_receipt": {
   158→          "allOf": [
   159→            {"$ref": "#/$defs/deferred_receipt"},
   160→            {"properties": {"path": {"const": "atomic-promotion-receipt.json"}, "owner": {"const": "system-dev-planner/C11"}}}
   161→          ]
   162→        },
   163→        "registration_receipt": {
   164→          "allOf": [
   165→            {"$ref": "#/$defs/deferred_receipt"},
   166→            {"properties": {"path": {"const": "dev-graph-registration-receipt.json"}, "owner": {"const": "dev-graph/C02"}}}
   167→          ]
   168→        }
   169→      }
   170→    }
   171→  },
   172→  "$defs": {
   173→    "digested_path": {
   174→      "type": "object",
   175→      "additionalProperties": false,
   176→      "required": ["path", "sha256"],
   177→      "properties": {
   178→        "path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
   179→        "sha256": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^[0-9a-f]{64}$"}
   180→      }
   181→    },
   182→    "deferred_receipt": {
   183→      "type": "object",
   184→      "additionalProperties": false,
   185→      "required": ["path", "owner", "status", "produced_by_this_component"],
   186→      "properties": {
   187→        "path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
   188→        "owner": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
   189→        "status": {"const": "not-emitted"},
   190→        "produced_by_this_component": {"const": false}
   191→      }
   192→    }
   193→  }
   194→}
   195→

1→{
     2→  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
     3→  "$id": "workstream-inventory.schema.json",
     4→  "title": "system-dev-planner workstream-inventory (draft)",
     5→  "description": "C01が1 featureから生成するfeature execution packageの13 phase task inventory。runtime outputは可変N taskではなくP01..P13 exact-set。詳細はreferences/feature-execution-package-contract.mdとworkstream-inventory-schema-design.md。",
     6→  "type": "object",
     7→  "required": ["schema_version", "feature_package_id", "parent_feature", "repo_context", "source_lineage", "tasks"],
     8→  "properties": {
     9→    "schema_version": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"},
    10→    "feature_package_id": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^feature-package/[A-Za-z0-9._/-]+$"},
    11→    "parent_feature": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1, "description": "起動元dev-graph feature graph_node_id。全13 taskと一致必須"},
    12→    "repo_context": {
    13→      "type": "object",
    14→      "required": ["config_path", "repo_identity", "root_resolution_source"],
    15→      "properties": {
    16→        "config_path": {"const": ".dev-graph/config.json"},
    17→        "repo_identity": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    18→        "root_resolution_source": {"enum": ["explicit-cli", "trusted-env", "git", "cwd-marker"]}
    19→      },
    20→      "additionalProperties": false
    21→    },
    22→    "source_lineage": {
    23→      "type": "object",
    24→      "required": ["source_plugin", "source_version", "compile_entrypoint", "completeness_entrypoint", "source_paths", "confirmed"],
    25→      "properties": {
    26→        "source_plugin": {"type": "string", "const": "system-spec-harness"},
    27→        "source_version": {"const": "0.1.0"},
    28→        "compile_entrypoint": {"const": "run-system-spec-compile"},
    29→        "completeness_entrypoint": {"const": "assign-system-spec-completeness-evaluator"},
    30→        "source_paths": {
    31→          "type": "array",
    32→          "items": {"type": "string"},
    33→          "minItems": 1,
    34→          "description": "引用元の system-spec-harness 確定成果物パス (system-spec/index.md・00-requirements-definition.md 等)。内容ロジックを複製しない証跡"
    35→        },
    36→        "confirmed": {"type": "boolean", "description": "引用元の confirmation_status=confirmed かつ evaluation_status=pass であることの写し"}
    37→      },
    38→      "additionalProperties": false
    39→    },
    40→    "tasks": {
    41→      "type": "array",
    42→      "minItems": 13,
    43→      "maxItems": 13,
    44→      "prefixItems": [
    45→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P01"}}}]},
    46→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P02"}}}]},
    47→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P03"}}}]},
    48→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P04"}}}]},
    49→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P05"}}}]},
    50→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P06"}}}]},
    51→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P07"}}}]},
    52→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P08"}}}]},
    53→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P09"}}}]},
    54→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P10"}}}]},
    55→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P11"}}}]},
    56→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P12"}}}]},
    57→        {"allOf": [{"$ref": "#/$defs/task"}, {"properties": {"phase_ref": {"const": "P13"}}}]}
    58→      ],
    59→      "items": false,
    60→      "description": "exactly 13 executable task specs in P01..P13 order; no separate phase-document axis"
    61→    }
    62→  },
    63→  "additionalProperties": false,
    64→  "$defs": {
    65→    "task": {
    66→      "type": "object",
    67→      "required": ["id", "feature_package_id", "parent_feature", "title", "owners", "tags", "related_nodes", "workstream_kind", "build_target_kind", "phase_ref", "depends_on", "write_scope", "deploy_unit", "source_lineage", "classification", "tracker_binding_intent", "github_publication", "pr_completion_policy", "branch_policy", "acceptance", "verification", "rollback", "implementation_readiness", "graph_node_registration"],
    68→      "properties": {
    69→        "id": {
    70→          "type": "string",
    71→          "pattern": "^SYS-[A-Z0-9][A-Z0-9-]*$",
    72→          "description": "task-spec id。dev-graph の graph_node_id 割当規約への接続は dev-graph-registration-contract.json と schemas-draft/dev-graph-registration.schema.json の確定契約に従う"
    73→        },
    74→        "feature_package_id": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^feature-package/[A-Za-z0-9._/-]+$"},
    75→        "parent_feature": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    76→        "title": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    77→        "owners": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}},
    78→        "tags": {"type": "array", "uniqueItems": true, "items": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}},
    79→        "related_nodes": {"type": "array", "uniqueItems": true, "items": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}},
    80→        "workstream_kind": {
    81→          "type": "string",
    82→          "enum": ["frontend", "backend", "api", "data", "infrastructure", "security", "quality", "documentation", "operations"],
    83→          "description": "生成対象タスクの主分類軸 (9値)。component-inventory.json の component_kind とは別軸"
    84→        },
    85→        "secondary_workstreams": {
    86→          "type": "array",
    87→          "items": {"type": "string", "enum": ["frontend", "backend", "api", "data", "infrastructure", "security", "quality", "documentation", "operations"]},
    88→          "uniqueItems": true,
    89→          "description": "主分類 workstream_kind 以外に副次的に関与する workstream (optional)。契約文書の secondary workstreams 句の受け皿"
    90→        },
    91→        "build_target_kind": {
    92→          "type": "string",
    93→          "enum": ["skill", "sub-agent", "slash-command", "hook", "script", "application-code"],
    94→          "description": "ビルド対象語彙 (6値=component_kind5値+application-code)。component_kind 5値のときは plugin-dev-planner 同型 builder routing、application-code のときは task-graph build/capability-build へ汎用 handoff"
    95→        },
    96→        "phase_ref": {
    97→          "type": "string",
    98→          "pattern": "^P(0[1-9]|1[0-3])$",
    99→          "description": "13 taskの一意なphase slot。P01..P13を各1件、配列順も同順で持つ"
   100→        },
   101→        "depends_on": {
   102→          "type": "array",
   103→          "items": {"type": "string"},
   104→          "description": "task-graph 射影の入力となる依存 task id 配列"
   105→        },
   106→        "implementation_readiness": {
   107→          "type": "object",
   108→          "required": ["status", "missing_sections", "checked_at"],
   109→          "properties": {
   110→            "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["complete", "incomplete"]},
   111→            "missing_sections": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}, "uniqueItems": true},
   112→            "checked_at": {"type": "string", "format": "date-time"}
   113→          },
   114→          "additionalProperties": false,
   115→          "description": "C08 (check-implementation-readiness.py) 判定結果。complete 未達では実装 handoff を fail-closed で停止する (goal-spec C4/constraints)"
   116→        },
   117→        "write_scope": {"type": "array", "minItems": 1, "items": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^(?!/)(?!.*(?:^|/)\\.\\.(?:/|$)).+$"}},
   118→        "deploy_unit": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
   119→        "source_lineage": {"type": "array", "minItems": 1, "items": {"type": "string"}},
   120→        "classification": {
   121→          "type": "object",
   122→          "additionalProperties": false,
   123→          "required": ["confidence", "reason", "candidates"],
   124→          "properties": {
   125→            "confidence": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0, "maximum": 1},
   126→            "reason": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
   127→            "candidates": {
   128→              "type": "array",
   129→              "items": {
   130→                "type": "object",
   131→                "additionalProperties": false,
   132→                "required": ["artifact_kind", "confidence", "candidate_path"],
   133→                "properties": {
   134→                  "artifact_kind": {"const": "task"},
   135→                  "confidence": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0, "maximum": 1},
   136→                  "candidate_path": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^tasks/.+\\.md$"}
   137→                }
   138→              }
   139→            }
   140→          }
   141→        },
   142→        "tracker_binding_intent": {
   143→          "type": "string",
   144→          "enum": ["auto", "beads", "github", "none"],
   145→          "description": "spec側の明示intent。autoはdev-graph repo-configのexecution_tracker.modeで解決し、mode=bothでは禁止する。system-dev-plannerは宣言だけを行い、永続tracker_bindingへの解決と起票はdev-graphが所有する"
   146→        },
   147→        "github_publication": {
   148→          "type": "object",
   149→          "additionalProperties": false,
   150→          "required": ["mode", "project_aliases", "labels", "milestone"],
   151→          "properties": {"mode": {"enum": ["local_only", "issue", "issue_and_projects"]}, "project_aliases": {"type": "array", "uniqueItems": true, "items": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}}, "labels": {"type": "array", "uniqueItems": true, "items": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}}, "milestone": {"type": ["string", "null"]}},
   152→          "description": "GitHubへの公開intent。tracker_binding_intent=beadsではlocal_only、githubではissue|issue_and_projectsを必須とする。beadsのGitHub viewer mirrorはbd github sync --push-onlyだけがauthorityで、Projects custom fieldsの管理対象外。"
   153→        },
   154→        "pr_completion_policy": {"enum": ["linked_pr_merged_all", "linked_pr_merged_any"]},
   155→        "branch_policy": {
   156→          "type": "object",
   157→          "additionalProperties": false,
   158→          "required": ["strategy", "worktree_lease_required", "completion_projection", "assignment_owner"],
   159→          "properties": {"strategy": {"const": "one-task-one-branch"}, "worktree_lease_required": {"const": true}, "completion_projection": {"const": "default-branch-reconciliation"}, "assignment_owner": {"const": "dev-graph-scheduler"}}
   160→        },
   161→        "acceptance": {"type": "array", "minItems": 1, "items": {"type": "string"}},
   162→        "verification": {"type": "array", "minItems": 1, "items": {"type": "string"}},
   163→        "rollback": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
   164→        "graph_node_registration": {
   165→          "type": ["object", "null"],
   166→          "properties": {
   167→            "graph_node_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
   168→            "file_path": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
   169→            "parent_feature": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
   170→            "feature_package_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
   171→            "phase_ref": {"type": ["string", "null"]}
   172→          },
   173→          "additionalProperties": false,
   174→          "description": "dev-graph の tasks/ グラフノード登録形式。実登録は dev-graph 側の所有 (本 plan は形式のみ提供)"
   175→        }
   176→      },
   177→      "allOf": [
   178→        {
   179→          "if": {"required": ["tracker_binding_intent"], "properties": {"tracker_binding_intent": {"enum": ["beads", "none"]}}},
   180→          "then": {"properties": {"github_publication": {"properties": {"mode": {"const": "local_only"}}}}}
   181→        },
   182→        {
   183→          "if": {"required": ["tracker_binding_intent"], "properties": {"tracker_binding_intent": {"const": "github"}}},
   184→          "then": {"properties": {"github_publication": {"properties": {"mode": {"enum": ["issue", "issue_and_projects"]}}}}}
   185→        }
   186→      ],
   187→      "additionalProperties": false
   188→    }
   189→  }
   190→}

1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→# /// script
     3→# name: resolve-project-context
     4→# purpose: symlink 導入先の caller repository root を --repo-root > trusted env > git toplevel > cwd marker の順で解決し、候補 realpath が host 宣言 $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR と一致する場合だけ採用する。repo-local config の repository_id を canonical GitHub remote / local git-dir fingerprint から再導出して照合し、全 content/state path を realpath containment 検査して cross-repo read・absolute/traversal・symlink escape・broken content symlink を診断付き exit 2 で拒否する共有 repo-context resolver。
     5→# inputs:
     6→#   - argv: [--repo-root DIR] [--config REL] [--path REL]
     7→#           [--feature-id ID --feature-context REL] [--json]
     8→#   - env: SYSTEM_DEV_PROJECT_ROOT | CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR | CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT
     9→# outputs:
    10→#   - stdout: canonical repo context JSON (repo_root/root_source/repository_id/content roots/diagnostics)
    11→#   - stderr: containment / identity / config violations
    12→#   - exit: 0=OK / 1=usage or IO error / 2=fail-closed policy violation
    13→# contexts: [C, E]
    14→# network: false
    15→# write-scope: none
    16→# dependencies: []
    17→# requires-python: ">=3.10"
    18→# ///
    19→"""Caller repository context resolver (C09).
    20→
    21→全 content/config/state の authority を「呼出元 repository root」に固定する単一の入口。
    22→plugin source root (symlink 物理元) は code/assets のロードにだけ使い、管理 content の
    23→正本にはしない。root の解決順・host 境界一致・repository_id 再導出・realpath containment を
    24→一箇所へ閉じ、下流 (C08/C10/C11/C12 と C01/C07) はこの JSON を唯一の repo-context 入力にする。
    25→"""
    26→from __future__ import annotations
    27→
    28→import argparse
    29→import hashlib
    30→import json
    31→import os
    32→import subprocess
    33→import sys
    34→import re
    35→from urllib.parse import urlsplit
    36→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    37→from pathlib import Path
    38→
    39→EXIT_OK = 0
    40→EXIT_USAGE = 1
    41→EXIT_POLICY = 2
    42→
    43→DEFAULT_CONFIG_REL = ".dev-graph/config.json"
    44→SENTINEL_REPOSITORY_ID = "__DERIVED_AT_INIT__"
    45→
    46→# project-config.schema.json の repository_id pattern と同値 (SSOT は schema)。
    47→_GITHUB_ID = "github:"
    48→_LOCAL_ID = "local:sha256:"
    49→
    50→
    51→class PolicyError(Exception):
    52→    """fail-closed (exit 2) となる契約違反。"""
    53→
    54→
    55→class UsageError(Exception):
    56→    """usage / IO error (exit 1)。"""
    57→
    58→
    59→def _now() -> str:
    60→    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
    61→
    62→
    63→def _git(repo: Path, *args: str) -> str | None:
    64→    """repo 内で git を実行し stdout を返す。失敗/未インストールは None。"""
    65→    try:
    66→        out = subprocess.run(
    67→            ["git", "-C", str(repo), *args],
    68→            capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10,
    69→        )
    70→    except (OSError, subprocess.SubprocessError):
    71→        return None
    72→    if out.returncode != 0:
    73→        return None
    74→    return out.stdout.strip() or None
    75→
    76→
    77→def _realpath(p: Path) -> Path:
    78→    return Path(os.path.realpath(p))
    79→
    80→
    81→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    82→# root 解決
    83→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    84→def resolve_repo_root(repo_root_arg: str | None, env: dict) -> tuple[Path, str, dict]:
    85→    """--repo-root > trusted env > git toplevel > cwd marker の順で候補を解く。
    86→
    87→    返り値は (realpath 済み root, root_source, trust_evidence)。
    88→    host 宣言 $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR が存在する場合、採用候補の realpath は
    89→    その realpath と一致しなければ PolicyError (exit 2) にする。
    90→    """
    91→    candidate: Path | None = None
    92→    source = None
    93→    evidence: dict = {}
    94→
    95→    if repo_root_arg:
    96→        candidate = Path(repo_root_arg)
    97→        source = "repo-root-flag"
    98→    elif env.get("SYSTEM_DEV_PROJECT_ROOT"):
    99→        candidate = Path(env["SYSTEM_DEV_PROJECT_ROOT"])
   100→        source = "trusted-env:SYSTEM_DEV_PROJECT_ROOT"
   101→    elif env.get("CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"):
   102→        candidate = Path(env["CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"])
   103→        source = "trusted-env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"
   104→    else:
   105→        toplevel = _git(Path.cwd(), "rev-parse", "--show-toplevel")
   106→        if toplevel:
   107→            candidate = Path(toplevel)
   108→            source = "git-toplevel"
   109→        else:
   110→            marker = _find_marker_upwards(Path.cwd())
   111→            if marker:
   112→                candidate = marker
   113→                source = "cwd-marker"
   114→
   115→    if candidate is None:
   116→        raise PolicyError(
   117→            "caller repository root を解決できない "
   118→            "(--repo-root / SYSTEM_DEV_PROJECT_ROOT / CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR / git / .dev-graph marker のいずれも無い)"
   119→        )
   120→    if not candidate.exists():
   121→        raise PolicyError(f"解決した repo root が存在しない: {candidate} (source={source})")
   122→
   123→    root_real = _realpath(candidate)
   124→
   125→    declared = env.get("CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR")
   126→    if declared:
   127→        declared_real = _realpath(Path(declared))
   128→        evidence["host_declared"] = str(declared_real)
   129→        if root_real != declared_real:
   130→            raise PolicyError(
   131→                f"root 候補 ({root_real}, source={source}) が host 宣言 $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR "
   132→                f"({declared_real}) と realpath 不一致。曖昧な候補は採用しない"
   133→            )
   134→        evidence["host_boundary_match"] = True
   135→    else:
   136→        evidence["host_declared"] = None
   137→        evidence["host_boundary_match"] = "undeclared-git-or-marker-accepted"
   138→
   139→    return root_real, source, evidence
   140→
   141→
   142→def _find_marker_upwards(start: Path) -> Path | None:
   143→    cur = _realpath(start)
   144→    for parent in [cur, *cur.parents]:
   145→        if (parent / DEFAULT_CONFIG_REL).is_file():
   146→            return parent
   147→    return None
   148→
   149→
   150→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   151→# repository_id の再導出
   152→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   153→def derive_repository_id(repo_root: Path) -> tuple[str, str]:
   154→    """canonical GitHub remote から github:<owner>/<repo>、無ければ
   155→    git common-dir realpath の sha256 で local:sha256:<64hex> を導出する。
   156→
   157→    C10 init と同じ規則。返り値は (repository_id, source)。
   158→    """
   159→    import hashlib
   160→
   161→    remote = _git(repo_root, "remote", "get-url", "origin")
   162→    gh = _parse_github_remote(remote) if remote else None
   163→    if gh:
   164→        return gh, "git-remote-origin"
   165→
   166→    common = _git(repo_root, "rev-parse", "--git-common-dir")
   167→    if common:
   168→        common_path = Path(common)
   169→        if not common_path.is_absolute():
   170→            common_path = repo_root / common_path
   171→        fingerprint = hashlib.sha256(str(_realpath(common_path)).encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
   172→        return f"{_LOCAL_ID}{fingerprint}", "local-git-dir-fingerprint"
   173→
   174→    # git を持たない repo は root realpath を最後の拠り所にする。
   175→    fingerprint = hashlib.sha256(str(repo_root).encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
   176→    return f"{_LOCAL_ID}{fingerprint}", "local-root-fingerprint"
   177→
   178→
   179→def _parse_github_remote(url: str) -> str | None:
   180→    """GitHub remote を host 完全一致で正規化する。
   181→
   182→    URL 形式と scp-like ``git@github.com:owner/repo.git`` のみを受理する。
   183→    ``evilgithub.com`` や ``github.com.example`` を部分文字列で GitHub と誤認しない。
   184→    """
   185→    u = url.strip()
   186→    host: str | None
   187→    tail: str
   188→    scp = re.fullmatch(r"(?:[^@/:]+@)?([^/:]+):(.+)", u)
   189→    if scp and "://" not in u:
   190→        host, tail = scp.group(1).lower(), scp.group(2)
   191→    else:
   192→        try:
   193→            parsed = urlsplit(u)
   194→        except ValueError:
   195→            return None
   196→        host = parsed.hostname.lower() if parsed.hostname else None
   197→        tail = parsed.path
   198→    if host != "github.com":
   199→        return None
   200→    tail = tail.strip("/")
   201→    if tail.endswith(".git"):
   202→        tail = tail[:-4]
   203→    parts = [seg for seg in tail.split("/") if seg]
   204→    if len(parts) != 2 or not all(re.fullmatch(r"[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+", part) for part in parts):
   205→        return None
   206→    owner, repo = parts[0], parts[1]
   207→    return f"{_GITHUB_ID}{owner}/{repo}"
   208→
   209→
   210→def _valid_repository_id(value: str) -> bool:
   211→    import re
   212→    return bool(re.fullmatch(
   213→        r"github:[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+/[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+|local:sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}", value
   214→    ))
   215→
   216→
   217→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   218→# path guard (realpath containment)
   219→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   220→def guard_relative_path(repo_root: Path, rel: str) -> Path:
   221→    """repo-relative path を containment 検査し、resolve 済み絶対 path を返す。
   222→
   223→    absolute / 空 / '..' segment / NUL を拒否し、既存対象は strict realpath、
   224→    未作成対象は実在する最長親を realpath 化して commonpath 検査する。
   225→    root 外へ逃げる (symlink escape 含む) 場合は PolicyError (exit 2)。
   226→    """
   227→    if rel is None or rel == "":
   228→        raise PolicyError("空の path は許可しない")
   229→    if "\x00" in rel:
   230→        raise PolicyError(f"NUL を含む path を拒否: {rel!r}")
   231→    p = Path(rel)
   232→    if p.is_absolute() or (len(rel) >= 2 and rel[1] == ":"):
   233→        raise PolicyError(f"absolute path を拒否 (repository 相対のみ許可): {rel}")
   234→    if ".." in p.parts:
   235→        raise PolicyError(f".. traversal を含む path を拒否: {rel}")
   236→
   237→    repo_real = _realpath(repo_root)
   238→    candidate = repo_root / p
   239→    if candidate.exists():
   240→        cand_real = _realpath(candidate)
   241→    else:
   242→        # 実在する最長の親を realpath 化する (作成予定対象)。
   243→        anchor = candidate.parent
   244→        while not anchor.exists() and anchor != anchor.parent:
   245→            anchor = anchor.parent
   246→        anchor_real = _realpath(anchor)
   247→        cand_real = anchor_real / candidate.relative_to(anchor) if anchor.exists() else candidate
   248→
   249→    try:
   250→        common = os.path.commonpath([str(repo_real), str(cand_real)])
   251→    except ValueError as exc:  # 異なる drive 等
   252→        raise PolicyError(f"containment 判定不能 (別 filesystem/drive?): {rel} ({exc})") from exc
   253→    if common != str(repo_real):
   254→        raise PolicyError(
   255→            f"realpath containment 違反: {rel} が repository root ({repo_real}) の外を指す "
   256→            f"(resolved={cand_real})"
   257→        )
   258→    return cand_real
   259→
   260→
   261→def validate_feature_context(repo_root: Path, feature_id: str, rel: str) -> dict:
   262→    """Validate the only plan input before any staging path may be created."""
   263→    path = guard_relative_path(repo_root, rel)
   264→    if not path.is_file():
   265→        raise UsageError(f"feature context が見つからない: {rel}")
   266→    try:
   267→        value = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   268→    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError) as exc:
   269→        raise UsageError(f"feature context を読めない: {rel} ({exc})") from exc
   270→    if not isinstance(value, dict):
   271→        raise PolicyError("feature context は JSON object 必須")
   272→    required = {
   273→        "graph_node_id", "artifact_kind", "purpose", "goal", "scope_in",
   274→        "scope_out", "acceptance", "architecture_refs", "updated_at",
   275→    }
   276→    if set(value) != required:
   277→        raise PolicyError(
   278→            f"feature context field exact-set 違反: missing={sorted(required - set(value))} "
   279→            f"extra={sorted(set(value) - required)}"
   280→        )
   281→    if value["graph_node_id"] != feature_id:
   282→        raise PolicyError(
   283→            f"feature id 不一致: --feature-id={feature_id!r} vs context={value['graph_node_id']!r}"
   284→        )
   285→    if value["artifact_kind"] != "feature":
   286→        raise PolicyError("feature context artifact_kind は 'feature' 必須")
   287→    for key in ("graph_node_id", "purpose", "goal"):
   288→        if not isinstance(value[key], str) or not value[key].strip():
   289→            raise PolicyError(f"feature context {key} は非空文字列必須")
   290→    for key in ("scope_in", "scope_out", "acceptance", "architecture_refs"):
   291→        items = value[key]
   292→        if not isinstance(items, list) or not items or any(
   293→            not isinstance(item, str) or not item.strip() for item in items
   294→        ):
   295→            raise PolicyError(f"feature context {key} は非空 string[] 必須")
   296→    try:
   297→        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(str(value["updated_at"]).replace("Z", "+00:00"))
   298→        if parsed.tzinfo is None:
   299→            raise ValueError
   300→    except ValueError as exc:
   301→        raise PolicyError("feature context updated_at は timezone 付き RFC3339 必須") from exc
   302→    architecture_paths: list[str] = []
   303→    for ref in value["architecture_refs"]:
   304→        target = guard_relative_path(repo_root, ref)
   305→        if not target.exists():
   306→            raise PolicyError(f"feature context architecture_ref が存在しない: {ref}")
   307→        architecture_paths.append(ref)
   308→    return {
   309→        "path": rel,
   310→        "graph_node_id": feature_id,
   311→        "sha256": hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest(),
   312→        "architecture_refs": architecture_paths,
   313→    }
   314→
   315→
   316→def _diagnose_content_symlink(repo_root: Path, rel: str, diagnostics: list) -> None:
   317→    """content symlink が broken/moved なら診断を積む (exists=False の symlink)。"""
   318→    p = repo_root / rel
   319→    if p.is_symlink() and not p.exists():
   320→        diagnostics.append({
   321→            "kind": "broken-content-symlink",
   322→            "path": rel,
   323→            "detail": "symlink が解決先を失っている (broken/moved)。C09 起動後の検査で拒否対象",
   324→        })
   325→
   326→
   327→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   328→# config
   329→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   330→def load_config(repo_root: Path, config_rel: str) -> dict:
   331→    cfg_abs = guard_relative_path(repo_root, config_rel)
   332→    if not Path(cfg_abs).is_file():
   333→        raise UsageError(f"repo-local config が見つからない: {config_rel} (init 未実行の可能性)")
   334→    try:
   335→        return json.loads(Path(cfg_abs).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   336→    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError) as exc:
   337→        raise UsageError(f"config を読めない: {config_rel} ({exc})") from exc
   338→
   339→
   340→def validate_and_resolve(repo_root: Path, config: dict, extra_path: str | None) -> dict:
   341→    diagnostics: list = []
   342→
   343→    stored_id = str(config.get("repository_id", ""))
   344→    if stored_id == SENTINEL_REPOSITORY_ID or not _valid_repository_id(stored_id):
   345→        raise PolicyError(
   346→            f"config.repository_id が sentinel/不正: {stored_id!r}。"
   347→            "C10 init が canonical remote / git-dir fingerprint から導出済みの値である必要がある"
   348→        )
   349→    derived_id, id_source = derive_repository_id(repo_root)
   350→    if derived_id != stored_id:
   351→        raise PolicyError(
   352→            f"repository_id 不一致: config={stored_id} vs 再導出={derived_id} "
   353→            f"(source={id_source})。repo 移動時は明示 rebind が必要"
   354→        )
   355→
   356→    resolved_roots: dict[str, dict] = {}
   357→    for section in ("content_roots", "local_state", "plan_roots"):
   358→        sec = config.get(section)
   359→        if not isinstance(sec, dict):
   360→            raise PolicyError(f"config.{section} が object でない")
   361→        resolved_roots[section] = {}
   362→        for key, rel in sec.items():
   363→            abs_path = guard_relative_path(repo_root, str(rel))
   364→            _diagnose_content_symlink(repo_root, str(rel), diagnostics)
   365→            resolved_roots[section][key] = {"relative": rel, "absolute": str(abs_path)}
   366→
   367→    extra = None
   368→    if extra_path:
   369→        extra_abs = guard_relative_path(repo_root, extra_path)
   370→        _diagnose_content_symlink(repo_root, extra_path, diagnostics)
   371→        extra = {"relative": extra_path, "absolute": str(extra_abs)}
   372→
   373→    return {
   374→        "repository_id": stored_id,
   375→        "repository_id_source": id_source,
   376→        "resolved_roots": resolved_roots,
   377→        "checked_path": extra,
   378→        "diagnostics": diagnostics,
   379→    }
   380→
   381→
   382→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   383→# main
   384→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   385→def build_context(argv: list[str] | None, env: dict) -> dict:
   386→    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Resolve caller repository context (C09)")
   387→    parser.add_argument("--repo-root", default=None)
   388→    parser.add_argument("--config", default=DEFAULT_CONFIG_REL)
   389→    parser.add_argument("--path", default=None, help="追加で containment 検査する repo-relative path")
   390→    parser.add_argument("--feature-id", default=None, help="plan input の dev-graph feature id")
   391→    parser.add_argument("--feature-context", default=None, help="plan input の repo-relative feature JSON")
   392→    parser.add_argument("--json", action="store_true", help="常に JSON を stdout に出す (既定)")
   393→    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
   394→
   395→    repo_root, root_source, evidence = resolve_repo_root(args.repo_root, env)
   396→    config = load_config(repo_root, args.config)
   397→    resolved = validate_and_resolve(repo_root, config, args.path)
   398→    if bool(args.feature_id) != bool(args.feature_context):
   399→        raise UsageError("--feature-id と --feature-context は同時指定必須")
   400→    feature_context = (
   401→        validate_feature_context(repo_root, args.feature_id, args.feature_context)
   402→        if args.feature_id and args.feature_context else None
   403→    )
   404→
   405→    plugin_root = env.get("CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT")
   406→    plugin_source = str(_realpath(Path(plugin_root))) if plugin_root else None
   407→
   408→    return {
   409→        "schema": "resolve-project-context/1.0.0",
   410→        "repo_root": str(repo_root),
   411→        "root_source": root_source,
   412→        "root_trust_evidence": evidence,
   413→        "repository_id": resolved["repository_id"],
   414→        "repository_id_source": resolved["repository_id_source"],
   415→        "config_path": args.config,
   416→        "content_roots": resolved["resolved_roots"]["content_roots"],
   417→        "local_state": resolved["resolved_roots"]["local_state"],
   418→        "plan_roots": resolved["resolved_roots"]["plan_roots"],
   419→        "checked_path": resolved["checked_path"],
   420→        "feature_context": feature_context,
   421→        "plugin_source": plugin_source,
   422→        "plugin_source_authority": "code-and-assets-only",
   423→        "resolved_at": _now(),
   424→        "diagnostics": resolved["diagnostics"],
   425→    }
   426→
   427→
   428→def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:
   429→    try:
   430→        context = build_context(argv, dict(os.environ))
   431→    except PolicyError as exc:
   432→        print(f"[fail-closed] {exc}", file=sys.stderr)
   433→        return EXIT_POLICY
   434→    except UsageError as exc:
   435→        print(f"[usage] {exc}", file=sys.stderr)
   436→        return EXIT_USAGE
   437→
   438→    if context["diagnostics"]:
   439→        # broken/moved content symlink 等は fail-closed 対象。
   440→        print(
   441→            "[fail-closed] content symlink diagnostics: "
   442→            + json.dumps(context["diagnostics"], ensure_ascii=False),
   443→            file=sys.stderr,
   444→        )
   445→        print(json.dumps(context, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
   446→        return EXIT_POLICY
   447→
   448→    print(json.dumps(context, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
   449→    return EXIT_OK
   450→
   451→
   452→if __name__ == "__main__":
   453→    raise SystemExit(main())
   454→

def sha256_bytes(data: bytes) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()


def sha256_file(path: Path) -> str:
    return sha256_bytes(path.read_bytes())


def canonical_digest(root: Path, relative_paths: list[str]) -> str:
    digest = hashlib.sha256()
    for rel in sorted(relative_paths):
        path = root / rel
        digest.update(rel.encode())
        digest.update(b"\0")
        digest.update(path.read_bytes())
        digest.update(b"\0")
    return "sha256:" + digest.hexdigest()


def make_task_spec(index: int) -> str:
    phase = PHASES[index]
    name = PHASE_NAMES[index]

completion_evidence: {{"policy":"manual","status":"in_progress","source":null,"completed_at":null,"reconciled_at":null,"evidence_refs":[]}}
implementation_readiness: {{"status":"complete","missing_sections":[],"checked_at":"{NOW}"}}
---

# System Specification

## 概要

Live trial fixture のシステム仕様。system-spec-harness 由来の確定仕様。

## 要件

- requirements handoff の正経路が動作すること
- 13 task package が正しく検証されること
"""


def make_task_md(index):
    task_id = TASK_IDS[index]
    phase = PHASES[index]
    name = PHASE_NAMES[index]
    deps = [TASK_IDS[index - 1]] if index > 0 else []
    digest = hashlib.sha256(f"task-{task_id}".encode()).hexdigest()
    return f"""---
graph_node_id: "{task_id}"
artifact_kind: "task"
artifact_subtypes: []
title: "{phase} {name} for {FEATURE_ID}"
project_id: "dev-graph-live-trial"
domain: "verification"
status: "active"
priority: "medium"
start_date: null
target_date: null
iteration: "R3"
owners: ["harness-maintainers"]
tags: ["live-trial", "safe", "system-task"]
file_path: "tasks/{task_id}.md"
template_id: "task"
template_version: "1.0.0"
confirmation_status: "confirmed"
evaluation_status: "pass"
confirmation_evidence: {{"evaluator":"fixture-evaluator","evidence_ref":"evidence/{task_id}.json","evaluated_digest":"{digest}"}}
source_lineage: {{"origin_kind":"system-dev-planner","source_plugin":"system-dev-planner","source_path":"system-plan/{FEATURE_ID}/task-specs/phase-{index+1:02d}-{name}.md","source_version":"1.0.0","source_digest":"{digest}","imported_at":"{NOW}"}}
created_at: "{NOW}"
updated_at: "{NOW}"
depends_on: {json.dumps(deps)}
related_nodes: []
resource_scope: ["tasks/{task_id}.md"]
purpose: null
goal: null
scope_in: []
scope_out: []
acceptance: []
architecture_refs: []
parent_feature: "{FEATURE_ID}"
feature_package_id: "{PKG_ID}"
phase_ref: "{phase}"
classification_confidence: 1.0
classification_reason: "system-dev-planner deterministic fixture"
classification_candidates: [{{"artifact_kind":"task","confidence":1.0,"candidate_path":"tasks/{task_id}.md"}}]
tracker_binding: "none"
beads_linkage: null
github_publication: {{"mode":"local_only","project_aliases":[],"labels":[],"milestone":null}}
issue_linkage: null
github_project_linkages: []
pull_request_linkages: []
execution_contexts: []
completion_evidence: {{"policy":"manual","status":"in_progress","source":null,"completed_at":null,"reconciled_at":null,"evidence_refs":[]}}
implementation_readiness: {{"status":"complete","missing_sections":[],"checked_at":"{NOW}"}}
---

# 目的

{phase} フェーズ ({name}) の実行成果物を生成する。

## 背景

{FEATURE_ID} のシステム開発計画に基づく {name} タスク。

## 入力と前提条件

- 依存: {', '.join(deps) if deps else 'なし'}
- feature {FEATURE_ID} が confirmed/pass/complete

## 出力と成果物

- {name} フェーズの成果ドキュメント

## 依存関係

- depends_on: {', '.join(deps) if deps else 'なし'}

## 実装対象

- Documentation: {name} evidence

## Write scope と競合制約

- touches: tasks/{task_id}.md

## GitHub publication

- Mode: local_only

## 実行手順

1. {name} フェーズの作業を実施する。

## 受入条件

- 成果物が検証を通過すること

## 検証方法

- 自動検証: validate-system-plan.py

## リスクとロールバック

- ロールバック: グラフ状態を復元

## Handoff

- route: capability-build
"""


def main():
    # Create directories
    for d in ["features", "architecture", "specs", "system-spec", "system-plan/LT-FEATURE-001/task-specs"]:
        (FIXTURE / d).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    # Write feature, architecture, spec markdown
    (FIXTURE / "features" / f"{FEATURE_ID}.md").write_text(make_feature_md(), encoding="utf-8")
    (FIXTURE / "architecture" / f"{ARCH_ID}.md").write_text(make_arch_md(), encoding="utf-8")
    (FIXTURE / "specs" / f"{SPEC_ID}.md").write_text(make_spec_md(), encoding="utf-8")

    # Write system-spec index (for C19 lineage)
    (FIXTURE / "system-spec" / "index.md").write_text("""---
title: "System Specification Index"
confirmation_status: "confirmed"
evaluation_status: "pass"
---

# System Specification Index

Live trial fixture の system specification index。
""", encoding="utf-8")

    # Write task markdown files
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        (FIXTURE / "tasks" / f"{task_id}.md").write_text(make_task_md(i), encoding="utf-8")

    # Remove old task file if it exists
    old_task = FIXTURE / "tasks" / "LT-TASK-001.md"
    if old_task.exists():
        old_task.unlink()

    # Write task spec files (system-dev-planner format)
    for i in range(13):
        spec_content = make_task_spec(i)
        (TASK_SPECS_DIR / f"phase-{i+1:02d}-{PHASE_NAMES[i]}.md").write_text(spec_content, encoding="utf-8")

    # Compute source_feature_digest from feature file
    feature_file = FIXTURE / "features" / f"{FEATURE_ID}.md"
    source_feature_digest = "sha256:" + sha256_file(feature_file)

    # Build feature-package.json
    feature_package = {
        "schema_version": "1.0.0",
        "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
        "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
        "source_feature_digest": source_feature_digest,
        "task_count": 13,
        "phase_refs": PHASES,
        "task_spec_paths": TASK_PATHS_REL,
        "task_node_ids": TASK_IDS,
    }
    (STAGING / "feature-package.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(feature_package, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Build workstream-inventory.json
    tasks_inventory = []
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        tasks_inventory.append({
            "id": task_id,
            "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
            "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
            "title": f"{PHASES[i]} {PHASE_NAMES[i]} for {FEATURE_ID}",
            "owners": ["harness-maintainers"],
            "tags": ["live-trial", "safe", "system-task"],
            "related_nodes": [],
            "workstream_kind": WORKSTREAM_KINDS[i],
            "build_target_kind": BUILD_TARGETS[i],
            "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            "depends_on": deps,
            "write_scope": [f"tasks/{task_id}.md"],
            "deploy_unit": "dev-graph-live-trial",
            "source_lineage": [
                f"system-spec/index.md",
                f"architecture/{ARCH_ID}.md",
            ],
            "classification": {
                "confidence": 1.0,
                "reason": "system-dev-planner deterministic fixture",
                "candidates": [{
                    "artifact_kind": "task",
                    "confidence": 1.0,
                    "candidate_path": f"tasks/{task_id}.md",
                }],
            },
            "tracker_binding_intent": "none",
            "github_publication": {"mode": "local_only", "project_aliases": [], "labels": [], "milestone": None},
            "pr_completion_policy": "linked_pr_merged_all",
            "branch_policy": {
                "strategy": "one-task-one-branch",
                "worktree_lease_required": True,
                "completion_projection": "default-branch-reconciliation",
                "assignment_owner": "dev-graph-scheduler",
            },
            "acceptance": [f"{PHASE_NAMES[i]} フェーズの成果物が検証を通過すること"],
            "verification": [f"validate-system-plan.py の {PHASES[i]} 検査が pass であること"],
            "rollback": "グラフ状態を復元する",
            "implementation_readiness": {
                "status": "complete",
                "missing_sections": [],
                "checked_at": NOW,
            },
            "graph_node_registration": {
                "graph_node_id": task_id,
                "file_path": f"tasks/{task_id}.md",
                "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
                "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
                "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            },
        })

    inventory = {
        "schema_version": "1.0.0",
        "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
        "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
        "repo_context": {
            "config_path": ".dev-graph/config.json",
            "repo_identity": REPO_ID,
            "root_resolution_source": "explicit-cli",
        },
        "source_lineage": {
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "compile_entrypoint": "run-system-spec-compile",
            "completeness_entrypoint": "assign-system-spec-completeness-evaluator",
            "source_paths": ["system-spec/index.md", "system-spec/00-requirements-definition.md"],
            "confirmed": True,
        },
        "tasks": tasks_inventory,
    }
    (STAGING / "workstream-inventory.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(inventory, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Build task-graph.json
    nodes_graph = []
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        nodes_graph.append({
            "id": task_id,
            "graph_node_id": task_id,
            "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
            "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
            "depends_on": deps,
            "status": "active",
        })
    task_graph = {"nodes": nodes_graph}
    (STAGING / "task-graph.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(task_graph, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Compute digests for base files (before handoff)
    BASE_DIGEST_FILES = ["feature-package.json", "workstream-inventory.json", "task-graph.json", *TASK_PATHS_REL]

    file_digests = {}
    for rel in BASE_DIGEST_FILES:
        file_digests[rel] = sha256_file(STAGING / rel)

    base_canonical = canonical_digest(STAGING, BASE_DIGEST_FILES)

    # Build source_inputs for handoff
    source_inputs = []
    for rel in BASE_DIGEST_FILES:
        source_inputs.append({"path": rel, "sha256": file_digests[rel]})

    # Build system-build-handoff.json
    # First write a preliminary staging-manifest (without handoff) to get its digest
    # Note: handoff cannot contain its own digest, so we compute it after writing

    handoff = {
        "schema_version": "1.0.0",
        "kind": "system-build-handoff",
        "identity": {
            "repository_id": REPO_ID,
            "feature_id": FEATURE_ID,
            "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
            "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
            "source_feature_digest": source_feature_digest,
        },
        "source_inputs": source_inputs,
        "source_manifest": {
            "path": "staging-manifest.json",
            "sha256_before_handoff": "placeholder",  # will be filled
            "canonical_digest_before_handoff": base_canonical,
        },
        "digest_contract": {
            "algorithm": "sha256",
            "source_digest_scope": "source_inputs only; handoff and manifest excluded",
            "handoff_digest_location": "staging-manifest.json#files/system-build-handoff.json",
            "final_manifest_digest_scope": "all manifest files including handoff; manifest itself excluded",
            "self_reference_policy": "handoff omits its own digest and final manifest digest",
        },
        "execution_tasks": [],
        "registration_request": {
            "path": "dev-graph-registration.json",
            "owner": "system-dev-planner/C11",
            "consumer": "dev-graph/C02",
            "status": "deferred-until-promotion",
            "promotion_receipt": {
                "path": "atomic-promotion-receipt.json",
                "owner": "system-dev-planner/C11",
                "status": "not-emitted",
                "produced_by_this_component": False,
            },
            "registration_receipt": {
                "path": "dev-graph-registration-receipt.json",
                "owner": "dev-graph/C02",
                "status": "not-emitted",
                "produced_by_this_component": False,
            },
        },
    }

    # Build execution_tasks
    for i in range(13):
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        handoff["execution_tasks"].append({
            "task_id": TASK_IDS[i],
            "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            "task_spec_path": TASK_PATHS_REL[i],
            "build_target_kind": BUILD_TARGETS[i],
            "depends_on": deps,
        })

    # Build preliminary staging-manifest (pre-handoff, used for sha256_before_handoff)
    pre_manifest_files = {}
    for rel in BASE_DIGEST_FILES:
        pre_manifest_files[rel] = file_digests[rel]

    pre_manifest = {
        "files": pre_manifest_files,
        "canonical_digest": base_canonical,
    }
    pre_manifest_bytes = (json.dumps(pre_manifest, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n").encode("utf-8")
    pre_manifest_sha = sha256_bytes(pre_manifest_bytes)

    # Now fill in handoff's source_manifest.sha256_before_handoff
    handoff["source_manifest"]["sha256_before_handoff"] = pre_manifest_sha

    # Write handoff
    handoff_bytes = (json.dumps(handoff, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n").encode("utf-8")
    (STAGING / "system-build-handoff.json").write_bytes(handoff_bytes)
    handoff_sha = sha256_bytes(handoff_bytes)

    # Build final staging-manifest (includes handoff)
    HANDOFF_PATH = "system-build-handoff.json"
    all_digest_files = [*BASE_DIGEST_FILES, HANDOFF_PATH]

    final_files = {}
    for rel in all_digest_files:
        final_files[rel] = sha256_file(STAGING / rel)

    final_canonical = canonical_digest(STAGING, all_digest_files)

    staging_manifest = {
        "files": final_files,
        "canonical_digest": final_canonical,
        "handoff_contract": {
            "schema_version": "1.0.0",
            "path": HANDOFF_PATH,
            "sha256": handoff_sha,
            "source_canonical_digest": base_canonical,
            "manifest_is_commit_point": True,
            "self_reference_policy": "handoff hash and final digest are manifest-only",
        },
    }
    (STAGING / "staging-manifest.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(staging_manifest, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Also write package.json (same as feature-package.json, for the --package arg)
    (STAGING / "package.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(feature_package, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Build graph nodes
    # Compute consistent digests for nodes
    feature_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "features" / f"{FEATURE_ID}.md")
    arch_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "architecture" / f"{ARCH_ID}.md")
    spec_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "specs" / f"{SPEC_ID}.md")

    nodes = []

    # Feature node
    nodes.append(make_graph_node(
        FEATURE_ID, "feature", "Live trial feature for requirements handoff",
        file_path=f"features/{FEATURE_ID}.md",
        purpose="Live trial fixture の requirements handoff 正経路を検証するための feature ノード",
        goal="Requirements handoff が capability-build/task-graph 向けに正常に生成されること",
        scope_in=["requirements handoff の正経路検証"],
        scope_out=["implementation code の生成"],
        acceptance=["handoff が13 task を含み lineage/digest が一致すること"],
        architecture_refs=[ARCH_ID],
        related_nodes=[SPEC_ID],
        resource_scope=[f"features/{FEATURE_ID}.md"],
        evaluated_digest=feature_digest,
        source_lineage={
            "origin_kind": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_path": "system-spec/index.md",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "source_digest": "c" * 64,
            "imported_at": NOW,
        },
    ))

    # Architecture node
    nodes.append(make_graph_node(
        ARCH_ID, "architecture", "Live trial backend architecture",
        artifact_subtypes=["backend"],
        file_path=f"architecture/{ARCH_ID}.md",
        related_nodes=[FEATURE_ID],
        resource_scope=[f"architecture/{ARCH_ID}.md"],
        evaluated_digest=arch_digest,
        source_lineage={
            "origin_kind": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_path": "system-spec/00-requirements-definition.md",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "source_digest": "d" * 64,
            "imported_at": NOW,
        },
    ))

    # Specification node
    nodes.append(make_graph_node(
        SPEC_ID, "specification", "Live trial system specification",
        file_path=f"specs/{SPEC_ID}.md",
        related_nodes=[FEATURE_ID, ARCH_ID],
        resource_scope=[f"specs/{SPEC_ID}.md"],
        evaluated_digest=spec_digest,
        source_lineage={
            "origin_kind": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_path": "system-spec/index.md",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "source_digest": "e" * 64,
            "imported_at": NOW,
        },
    ))

    # Task nodes
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        phase = PHASES[i]
        name = PHASE_NAMES[i]
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        task_file_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "tasks" / f"{task_id}.md")
        task_source_digest = hashlib.sha256(f"task-{task_id}".encode()).hexdigest()

        nodes.append(make_graph_node(
            task_id, "task", f"{phase} {name} for {FEATURE_ID}",
            file_path=f"tasks/{task_id}.md",
            depends_on=deps,
            resource_scope=[f"tasks/{task_id}.md"],
            parent_feature=FEATURE_ID,
            feature_package_id=PKG_ID,
            phase_ref=phase,
            tags=["live-trial", "safe", "system-task"],
            evaluated_digest=task_source_digest,
            source_lineage={
                "origin_kind": "system-dev-planner",
                "source_plugin": "system-dev-planner",
                "source_path": f"system-plan/{FEATURE_ID}/task-specs/phase-{i+1:02d}-{name}.md",
                "source_version": "1.0.0",
                "source_digest": task_source_digest,
                "imported_at": NOW,
            },
        ))

    # Write graph.json
    graph = {"graph_revision": 2, "nodes": nodes}
    (FIXTURE / ".dev-graph" / "state" / "graph.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(graph, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Update config.json to add plan_roots
    config_path = FIXTURE / ".dev-graph" / "config.json"
    config = json.loads(config_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    config["plan_roots"] = {
        "system_plan": "system-plan",
    }
    if "system_spec" not in config.get("content_roots", {}):
        config["content_roots"]["system_spec"] = "system-spec"
    config_path.write_text(json.dumps(config, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Also create system-spec/00-requirements-definition.md
    (FIXTURE / "system-spec" / "00-requirements-definition.md").write_text("""---
title: "Requirements Definition"
confirmation_status: "confirmed"
evaluation_status: "pass"
---

# Requirements Definition

Live trial fixture の requirements definition。system-spec-harness 由来。
""", encoding="utf-8")

    print("Fixture generated successfully!")
    print(f"  Feature: {FEATURE_ID}")
    print(f"  Architecture: {ARCH_ID}")
    print(f"  Specification: {SPEC_ID}")
    print(f"  Tasks: {TASK_IDS[0]} .. {TASK_IDS[-1]}")
    print(f"  Package: {PKG_ID}")
    print(f"  Source feature digest: {source_feature_digest}")
    print(f"  Base canonical digest: {base_canonical}")
    print(f"  Final canonical digest: {final_canonical}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Generate r3-requirements fixture with all digests aligned."""
import hashlib
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

FIXTURE = Path("/Users/dm/dev/dev/個人開発/harness/.worktrees/task-20260712-134250-wt-7/eval-log/dev-graph/live-trial-fixtures/r3-requirements")
STAGING = FIXTURE / "system-plan" / "LT-FEATURE-001"
TASK_SPECS_DIR = STAGING / "task-specs"
NOW = "2026-07-13T08:00:00Z"
REPO_ID = "github:example/dev-graph-live-trial"
FEATURE_ID = "LT-FEATURE-001"
ARCH_ID = "LT-ARCH-001"
SPEC_ID = "LT-SPEC-001"
PKG_ID = "feature-package/LT-FEATURE-001"
PHASES = [f"P{i:02d}" for i in range(1, 14)]
TASK_IDS = [f"SYS-LT001-P{i:02d}" for i in range(1, 14)]
TASK_PATHS_REL = [
    "task-specs/phase-01-requirements.md", "task-specs/phase-02-architecture.md",
    "task-specs/phase-03-design-review.md", "task-specs/phase-04-test-design.md",
    "task-specs/phase-05-implementation.md", "task-specs/phase-06-test-run.md",
    "task-specs/phase-07-acceptance.md", "task-specs/phase-08-refactoring-migration.md",
    "task-specs/phase-09-quality-assurance.md", "task-specs/phase-10-final-review.md",
    "task-specs/phase-11-evidence.md", "task-specs/phase-12-documentation-operations.md",
    "task-specs/phase-13-release-deploy.md",
]
PHASE_NAMES = [
    "requirements", "architecture", "design-review", "test-design",
    "implementation", "test-run", "acceptance", "refactoring-migration",
    "quality-assurance", "final-review", "evidence", "documentation-operations",
    "release-deploy",
]
WORKSTREAM_KINDS = [
    "documentation", "backend", "quality", "quality",
    "backend", "quality", "quality", "backend",
    "quality", "quality", "documentation", "documentation",
    "operations",
]
BUILD_TARGETS = [
    "documentation", "application-code", "documentation", "documentation",
    "application-code", "script", "documentation", "application-code",
    "script", "documentation", "documentation", "documentation",
    "documentation",
]


def sha256_bytes(data: bytes) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()


def sha256_file(path: Path) -> str:
    return sha256_bytes(path.read_bytes())


def canonical_digest(root: Path, relative_paths: list[str]) -> str:
    digest = hashlib.sha256()
    for rel in sorted(relative_paths):
        path = root / rel
        digest.update(rel.encode())
        digest.update(b"\0")
        digest.update(path.read_bytes())
        digest.update(b"\0")
    return "sha256:" + digest.hexdigest()


def make_task_spec(index: int) -> str:
    phase = PHASES[index]
    name = PHASE_NAMES[index]
    task_id = TASK_IDS[index]
    deps = [TASK_IDS[index - 1]] if index > 0 else []
    deps_str = ", ".join(deps) if deps else "なし"
    return f"""# {phase}: {name}

## Machine-readable registration fields

- task_id: {task_id}
- phase_ref: {phase}
- parent_feature: {FEATURE_ID}
- feature_package_id: {PKG_ID}
- depends_on: [{', '.join(f'"{d}"' for d in deps)}]
- file_path: tasks/{task_id}.md
- workstream_kind: {WORKSTREAM_KINDS[index]}
- build_target_kind: {BUILD_TARGETS[index]}

## 目的

{phase} フェーズの実行成果物を生成し、{FEATURE_ID} の {name} 要件を満たす。

## 背景

{FEATURE_ID} のシステム開発計画に基づき、{name} フェーズとして定義された作業を遂行する。
アーキテクチャ参照: {ARCH_ID}、仕様参照: {SPEC_ID}。

## 前提条件

- 前フェーズ依存: {deps_str}
- feature node {FEATURE_ID} が confirmed/pass/readiness-complete であること
- architecture node {ARCH_ID} が confirmed であること

## Workstream applicability

- primary: {WORKSTREAM_KINDS[index]}
- secondary: なし
- 根拠: {name} フェーズの主作業分類に基づく

## Architecture and deploy unit

- deploy_unit: dev-graph-live-trial
- architecture_ref: {ARCH_ID}
- 対象コンポーネント: fixture 検証用

## 成果物

- {name} フェーズの成果ドキュメント
- 検証証跡

## Tracker publication and completion

- tracker_binding_intent: none
- github_publication.mode: local_only
- pr_completion_policy: linked_pr_merged_all
- 完了条件: 成果物が検証を通過すること

## Branch and worktree execution

- strategy: one-task-one-branch
- worktree_lease_required: true
- completion_projection: default-branch-reconciliation
- assignment_owner: dev-graph-scheduler

## スコープ外

- 他の feature の作業は含まない
- 本フェーズ以外のフェーズの作業は含まない

## Verification and evidence

- 自動検証: validate-system-plan.py の {phase} 検査が pass であること
- 手動検証: 成果物の内容確認
- 証跡: system-plan/{FEATURE_ID}/task-specs/ 配下の対応ファイル

## Rollout and rollback

- ロールアウト: 成果物を tasks/ 配下に配置
- ロールバック: 配置前のグラフ状態に復元

## Handoff

- 実装 route: capability-build
- 次フェーズ: {PHASES[index + 1] if index < 12 else "完了"}

## 参照情報

- feature: {FEATURE_ID}
- architecture: {ARCH_ID}
- specification: {SPEC_ID}
- package: {PKG_ID}
"""


def make_graph_node(node_id, kind, title, **kwargs):
    """Create a minimal valid graph node."""
    node = {
        "graph_node_id": node_id,
        "artifact_kind": kind,
        "artifact_subtypes": kwargs.get("artifact_subtypes", []),
        "title": title,
        "project_id": "dev-graph-live-trial",
        "domain": "verification",
        "status": "active",
        "owners": ["harness-maintainers"],
        "tags": ["live-trial", "safe"],
        "priority": "medium",
        "start_date": None,
        "target_date": None,
        "iteration": "R3",
        "created_at": NOW,
        "updated_at": NOW,
        "depends_on": kwargs.get("depends_on", []),
        "related_nodes": kwargs.get("related_nodes", []),
        "resource_scope": kwargs.get("resource_scope", []),
        "purpose": kwargs.get("purpose", None),
        "goal": kwargs.get("goal", None),
        "scope_in": kwargs.get("scope_in", []),
        "scope_out": kwargs.get("scope_out", []),
        "acceptance": kwargs.get("acceptance", []),
        "architecture_refs": kwargs.get("architecture_refs", []),
        "parent_feature": kwargs.get("parent_feature", None),
        "feature_package_id": kwargs.get("feature_package_id", None),
        "phase_ref": kwargs.get("phase_ref", None),
        "file_path": kwargs["file_path"],
        "template_id": kind,
        "template_version": "1.0.0",
        "confirmation_status": "confirmed",
        "evaluation_status": "pass",
        "confirmation_evidence": {
            "evaluator": "fixture-evaluator",
            "evidence_ref": f"evidence/{node_id}.json",
            "evaluated_digest": kwargs.get("evaluated_digest", "a" * 64),
        },
        "source_lineage": kwargs.get("source_lineage", {
            "origin_kind": "manual",
            "source_plugin": None,
            "source_path": kwargs["file_path"],
            "source_version": "1.0.0",
            "source_digest": "b" * 64,
            "imported_at": NOW,
        }),
        "classification_confidence": 1.0,
        "classification_reason": "Deterministic fixture",
        "classification_candidates": [{
            "artifact_kind": kind,
            "confidence": 1.0,
            "candidate_path": kwargs["file_path"],
        }],
        "github_publication": {"mode": "local_only", "project_aliases": [], "labels": [], "milestone": None},
        "issue_linkage": None,
        "tracker_binding": "none",
        "beads_linkage": None,
        "github_project_linkages": [],
        "pull_request_linkages": [],
        "execution_contexts": [],
        "completion_evidence": {
            "policy": "manual",
            "status": "in_progress",
            "source": None,
            "completed_at": None,
            "reconciled_at": None,
            "evidence_refs": [],
        },
        "implementation_readiness": {
            "status": "complete",
            "missing_sections": [],
            "checked_at": NOW,
        },
    }
    return node
