def make_task_md(index):
    task_id = TASK_IDS[index]
    phase = PHASES[index]
    name = PHASE_NAMES[index]
    deps = [TASK_IDS[index - 1]] if index > 0 else []
    digest = hashlib.sha256(f"task-{task_id}".encode()).hexdigest()
    return f"""---
graph_node_id: "{task_id}"
artifact_kind: "task"
artifact_subtypes: []
title: "{phase} {name} for {FEATURE_ID}"
project_id: "dev-graph-live-trial"
domain: "verification"
status: "active"
priority: "medium"
start_date: null
target_date: null
iteration: "R3"
owners: ["harness-maintainers"]
tags: ["live-trial", "safe", "system-task"]
file_path: "tasks/{task_id}.md"
template_id: "task"
template_version: "1.0.0"
confirmation_status: "confirmed"
evaluation_status: "pass"
confirmation_evidence: {{"evaluator":"fixture-evaluator","evidence_ref":"evidence/{task_id}.json","evaluated_digest":"{digest}"}}
source_lineage: {{"origin_kind":"system-dev-planner","source_plugin":"system-dev-planner","source_path":"system-plan/{FEATURE_ID}/task-specs/phase-{index+1:02d}-{name}.md","source_version":"1.0.0","source_digest":"{digest}","imported_at":"{NOW}"}}
created_at: "{NOW}"
updated_at: "{NOW}"
depends_on: {json.dumps(deps)}
related_nodes: []
resource_scope: ["tasks/{task_id}.md"]
purpose: null
goal: null
scope_in: []
scope_out: []
acceptance: []
architecture_refs: []
parent_feature: "{FEATURE_ID}"
feature_package_id: "{PKG_ID}"
phase_ref: "{phase}"
classification_confidence: 1.0
classification_reason: "system-dev-planner deterministic fixture"
classification_candidates: [{{"artifact_kind":"task","confidence":1.0,"candidate_path":"tasks/{task_id}.md"}}]
tracker_binding: "none"
beads_linkage: null
github_publication: {{"mode":"local_only","project_aliases":[],"labels":[],"milestone":null}}
issue_linkage: null
github_project_linkages: []
pull_request_linkages: []
execution_contexts: []
completion_evidence: {{"policy":"manual","status":"in_progress","source":null,"completed_at":null,"reconciled_at":null,"evidence_refs":[]}}
implementation_readiness: {{"status":"complete","missing_sections":[],"checked_at":"{NOW}"}}
---

# 目的

{phase} フェーズ ({name}) の実行成果物を生成する。

## 背景

{FEATURE_ID} のシステム開発計画に基づく {name} タスク。

## 入力と前提条件

- 依存: {', '.join(deps) if deps else 'なし'}
- feature {FEATURE_ID} が confirmed/pass/complete

## 出力と成果物

- {name} フェーズの成果ドキュメント

## 依存関係

- depends_on: {', '.join(deps) if deps else 'なし'}

## 実装対象

- Documentation: {name} evidence

## Write scope と競合制約

- touches: tasks/{task_id}.md

## GitHub publication

- Mode: local_only

## 実行手順

1. {name} フェーズの作業を実施する。

## 受入条件

- 成果物が検証を通過すること

## 検証方法

- 自動検証: validate-system-plan.py

## リスクとロールバック

- ロールバック: グラフ状態を復元

## Handoff

- route: capability-build
"""


def main():
    # Create directories
    for d in ["features", "architecture", "specs", "system-spec", "system-plan/LT-FEATURE-001/task-specs"]:
        (FIXTURE / d).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    # Write feature, architecture, spec markdown
    (FIXTURE / "features" / f"{FEATURE_ID}.md").write_text(make_feature_md(), encoding="utf-8")
    (FIXTURE / "architecture" / f"{ARCH_ID}.md").write_text(make_arch_md(), encoding="utf-8")
    (FIXTURE / "specs" / f"{SPEC_ID}.md").write_text(make_spec_md(), encoding="utf-8")

    # Write system-spec index (for C19 lineage)
    (FIXTURE / "system-spec" / "index.md").write_text("""---
title: "System Specification Index"
confirmation_status: "confirmed"
evaluation_status: "pass"
---

# System Specification Index

Live trial fixture の system specification index。
""", encoding="utf-8")

    # Write task markdown files
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        (FIXTURE / "tasks" / f"{task_id}.md").write_text(make_task_md(i), encoding="utf-8")

    # Remove old task file if it exists
    old_task = FIXTURE / "tasks" / "LT-TASK-001.md"
    if old_task.exists():
        old_task.unlink()

    # Write task spec files (system-dev-planner format)
    for i in range(13):
        spec_content = make_task_spec(i)
        (TASK_SPECS_DIR / f"phase-{i+1:02d}-{PHASE_NAMES[i]}.md").write_text(spec_content, encoding="utf-8")

    # Compute source_feature_digest from feature file
    feature_file = FIXTURE / "features" / f"{FEATURE_ID}.md"
    source_feature_digest = "sha256:" + sha256_file(feature_file)

    # Build feature-package.json
    feature_package = {
        "schema_version": "1.0.0",
        "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
        "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
        "source_feature_digest": source_feature_digest,
        "task_count": 13,
        "phase_refs": PHASES,
        "task_spec_paths": TASK_PATHS_REL,
        "task_node_ids": TASK_IDS,
    }
    (STAGING / "feature-package.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(feature_package, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Build workstream-inventory.json
    tasks_inventory = []
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        tasks_inventory.append({
            "id": task_id,
            "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
            "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
            "title": f"{PHASES[i]} {PHASE_NAMES[i]} for {FEATURE_ID}",
            "owners": ["harness-maintainers"],
            "tags": ["live-trial", "safe", "system-task"],
            "related_nodes": [],
            "workstream_kind": WORKSTREAM_KINDS[i],
            "build_target_kind": BUILD_TARGETS[i],
            "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            "depends_on": deps,
            "write_scope": [f"tasks/{task_id}.md"],
            "deploy_unit": "dev-graph-live-trial",
            "source_lineage": [
                f"system-spec/index.md",
                f"architecture/{ARCH_ID}.md",
            ],
            "classification": {
                "confidence": 1.0,
                "reason": "system-dev-planner deterministic fixture",
                "candidates": [{
                    "artifact_kind": "task",
                    "confidence": 1.0,
                    "candidate_path": f"tasks/{task_id}.md",
                }],
            },
            "tracker_binding_intent": "none",
            "github_publication": {"mode": "local_only", "project_aliases": [], "labels": [], "milestone": None},
            "pr_completion_policy": "linked_pr_merged_all",
            "branch_policy": {
                "strategy": "one-task-one-branch",
                "worktree_lease_required": True,
                "completion_projection": "default-branch-reconciliation",
                "assignment_owner": "dev-graph-scheduler",
            },
            "acceptance": [f"{PHASE_NAMES[i]} フェーズの成果物が検証を通過すること"],
            "verification": [f"validate-system-plan.py の {PHASES[i]} 検査が pass であること"],
            "rollback": "グラフ状態を復元する",
            "implementation_readiness": {
                "status": "complete",
                "missing_sections": [],
                "checked_at": NOW,
            },
            "graph_node_registration": {
                "graph_node_id": task_id,
                "file_path": f"tasks/{task_id}.md",
                "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
                "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
                "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            },
        })

    inventory = {
        "schema_version": "1.0.0",
        "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
        "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
        "repo_context": {
            "config_path": ".dev-graph/config.json",
            "repo_identity": REPO_ID,
            "root_resolution_source": "explicit-cli",
        },
        "source_lineage": {
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "compile_entrypoint": "run-system-spec-compile",
            "completeness_entrypoint": "assign-system-spec-completeness-evaluator",
            "source_paths": ["system-spec/index.md", "system-spec/00-requirements-definition.md"],
            "confirmed": True,
        },
        "tasks": tasks_inventory,
    }
    (STAGING / "workstream-inventory.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(inventory, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Build task-graph.json
    nodes_graph = []
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        nodes_graph.append({
            "id": task_id,
            "graph_node_id": task_id,
            "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
            "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
            "depends_on": deps,
            "status": "active",
        })
    task_graph = {"nodes": nodes_graph}
    (STAGING / "task-graph.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(task_graph, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Compute digests for base files (before handoff)
    BASE_DIGEST_FILES = ["feature-package.json", "workstream-inventory.json", "task-graph.json", *TASK_PATHS_REL]

    file_digests = {}
    for rel in BASE_DIGEST_FILES:
        file_digests[rel] = sha256_file(STAGING / rel)

    base_canonical = canonical_digest(STAGING, BASE_DIGEST_FILES)

    # Build source_inputs for handoff
    source_inputs = []
    for rel in BASE_DIGEST_FILES:
        source_inputs.append({"path": rel, "sha256": file_digests[rel]})

    # Build system-build-handoff.json
    # First write a preliminary staging-manifest (without handoff) to get its digest
    # Note: handoff cannot contain its own digest, so we compute it after writing

    handoff = {
        "schema_version": "1.0.0",
        "kind": "system-build-handoff",
        "identity": {
            "repository_id": REPO_ID,
            "feature_id": FEATURE_ID,
            "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
            "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
            "source_feature_digest": source_feature_digest,
        },
        "source_inputs": source_inputs,
        "source_manifest": {
            "path": "staging-manifest.json",
            "sha256_before_handoff": "placeholder",  # will be filled
            "canonical_digest_before_handoff": base_canonical,
        },
        "digest_contract": {
            "algorithm": "sha256",
            "source_digest_scope": "source_inputs only; handoff and manifest excluded",
            "handoff_digest_location": "staging-manifest.json#files/system-build-handoff.json",
            "final_manifest_digest_scope": "all manifest files including handoff; manifest itself excluded",
            "self_reference_policy": "handoff omits its own digest and final manifest digest",
        },
        "execution_tasks": [],
        "registration_request": {
            "path": "dev-graph-registration.json",
            "owner": "system-dev-planner/C11",
            "consumer": "dev-graph/C02",
            "status": "deferred-until-promotion",
            "promotion_receipt": {
                "path": "atomic-promotion-receipt.json",
                "owner": "system-dev-planner/C11",
                "status": "not-emitted",
                "produced_by_this_component": False,
            },
            "registration_receipt": {
                "path": "dev-graph-registration-receipt.json",
                "owner": "dev-graph/C02",
                "status": "not-emitted",
                "produced_by_this_component": False,
            },
        },
    }

    # Build execution_tasks
    for i in range(13):
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        handoff["execution_tasks"].append({
            "task_id": TASK_IDS[i],
            "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            "task_spec_path": TASK_PATHS_REL[i],
            "build_target_kind": BUILD_TARGETS[i],
            "depends_on": deps,
        })

    # Build preliminary staging-manifest (pre-handoff, used for sha256_before_handoff)
    pre_manifest_files = {}
    for rel in BASE_DIGEST_FILES:
        pre_manifest_files[rel] = file_digests[rel]

    pre_manifest = {
        "files": pre_manifest_files,
        "canonical_digest": base_canonical,
    }
    pre_manifest_bytes = (json.dumps(pre_manifest, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n").encode("utf-8")
    pre_manifest_sha = sha256_bytes(pre_manifest_bytes)

    # Now fill in handoff's source_manifest.sha256_before_handoff
    handoff["source_manifest"]["sha256_before_handoff"] = pre_manifest_sha

    # Write handoff
    handoff_bytes = (json.dumps(handoff, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n").encode("utf-8")
    (STAGING / "system-build-handoff.json").write_bytes(handoff_bytes)
    handoff_sha = sha256_bytes(handoff_bytes)

    # Build final staging-manifest (includes handoff)
    HANDOFF_PATH = "system-build-handoff.json"
    all_digest_files = [*BASE_DIGEST_FILES, HANDOFF_PATH]

    final_files = {}
    for rel in all_digest_files:
        final_files[rel] = sha256_file(STAGING / rel)

    final_canonical = canonical_digest(STAGING, all_digest_files)

    staging_manifest = {
        "files": final_files,
        "canonical_digest": final_canonical,
        "handoff_contract": {
            "schema_version": "1.0.0",
            "path": HANDOFF_PATH,
            "sha256": handoff_sha,
            "source_canonical_digest": base_canonical,
            "manifest_is_commit_point": True,
            "self_reference_policy": "handoff hash and final digest are manifest-only",
        },
    }
    (STAGING / "staging-manifest.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(staging_manifest, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Also write package.json (same as feature-package.json, for the --package arg)
    (STAGING / "package.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(feature_package, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Build graph nodes
    # Compute consistent digests for nodes
    feature_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "features" / f"{FEATURE_ID}.md")
    arch_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "architecture" / f"{ARCH_ID}.md")
    spec_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "specs" / f"{SPEC_ID}.md")

    nodes = []

    # Feature node
    nodes.append(make_graph_node(
        FEATURE_ID, "feature", "Live trial feature for requirements handoff",
        file_path=f"features/{FEATURE_ID}.md",
        purpose="Live trial fixture の requirements handoff 正経路を検証するための feature ノード",
        goal="Requirements handoff が capability-build/task-graph 向けに正常に生成されること",
        scope_in=["requirements handoff の正経路検証"],
        scope_out=["implementation code の生成"],
        acceptance=["handoff が13 task を含み lineage/digest が一致すること"],
        architecture_refs=[ARCH_ID],
        related_nodes=[SPEC_ID],
        resource_scope=[f"features/{FEATURE_ID}.md"],
        evaluated_digest=feature_digest,
        source_lineage={
            "origin_kind": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_path": "system-spec/index.md",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "source_digest": "c" * 64,
            "imported_at": NOW,
        },
    ))

    # Architecture node
    nodes.append(make_graph_node(
        ARCH_ID, "architecture", "Live trial backend architecture",
        artifact_subtypes=["backend"],
        file_path=f"architecture/{ARCH_ID}.md",
        related_nodes=[FEATURE_ID],
        resource_scope=[f"architecture/{ARCH_ID}.md"],
        evaluated_digest=arch_digest,
        source_lineage={
            "origin_kind": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_path": "system-spec/00-requirements-definition.md",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "source_digest": "d" * 64,
            "imported_at": NOW,
        },
    ))

    # Specification node
    nodes.append(make_graph_node(
        SPEC_ID, "specification", "Live trial system specification",
        file_path=f"specs/{SPEC_ID}.md",
        related_nodes=[FEATURE_ID, ARCH_ID],
        resource_scope=[f"specs/{SPEC_ID}.md"],
        evaluated_digest=spec_digest,
        source_lineage={
            "origin_kind": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_path": "system-spec/index.md",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "source_digest": "e" * 64,
            "imported_at": NOW,
        },
    ))

    # Task nodes
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        phase = PHASES[i]
        name = PHASE_NAMES[i]
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        task_file_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "tasks" / f"{task_id}.md")
        task_source_digest = hashlib.sha256(f"task-{task_id}".encode()).hexdigest()

        nodes.append(make_graph_node(
            task_id, "task", f"{phase} {name} for {FEATURE_ID}",
            file_path=f"tasks/{task_id}.md",
            depends_on=deps,
            resource_scope=[f"tasks/{task_id}.md"],
            parent_feature=FEATURE_ID,
            feature_package_id=PKG_ID,
            phase_ref=phase,
            tags=["live-trial", "safe", "system-task"],
            evaluated_digest=task_source_digest,
            source_lineage={
                "origin_kind": "system-dev-planner",
                "source_plugin": "system-dev-planner",
                "source_path": f"system-plan/{FEATURE_ID}/task-specs/phase-{i+1:02d}-{name}.md",
                "source_version": "1.0.0",
                "source_digest": task_source_digest,
                "imported_at": NOW,
            },
        ))

    # Write graph.json
    graph = {"graph_revision": 2, "nodes": nodes}
    (FIXTURE / ".dev-graph" / "state" / "graph.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(graph, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Update config.json to add plan_roots
    config_path = FIXTURE / ".dev-graph" / "config.json"
    config = json.loads(config_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    config["plan_roots"] = {
        "system_plan": "system-plan",
    }
    if "system_spec" not in config.get("content_roots", {}):
        config["content_roots"]["system_spec"] = "system-spec"
    config_path.write_text(json.dumps(config, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Also create system-spec/00-requirements-definition.md
    (FIXTURE / "system-spec" / "00-requirements-definition.md").write_text("""---
title: "Requirements Definition"
confirmation_status: "confirmed"
evaluation_status: "pass"
---

# Requirements Definition

Live trial fixture の requirements definition。system-spec-harness 由来。
""", encoding="utf-8")

    print("Fixture generated successfully!")
    print(f"  Feature: {FEATURE_ID}")
    print(f"  Architecture: {ARCH_ID}")
    print(f"  Specification: {SPEC_ID}")
    print(f"  Tasks: {TASK_IDS[0]} .. {TASK_IDS[-1]}")
    print(f"  Package: {PKG_ID}")
    print(f"  Source feature digest: {source_feature_digest}")
    print(f"  Base canonical digest: {base_canonical}")
    print(f"  Final canonical digest: {final_canonical}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.thinking:
The issue is with `build_target_kind` - the allowed values in the workstream-inventory schema are:
```
"enum": ["skill", "sub-agent", "slash-command", "hook", "script", "application-code"]
```

But I used "documentation" as a build_target_kind, which is not in that enum. Let me fix the BUILD_TARGETS array. The system-build-handoff schema has a different enum:
```
"enum": ["application-code", "skill", "sub-agent", "slash-command", "hook", "script", "documentation", "infrastructure", "data-migration"]
```

So "documentation" is valid in the handoff schema but not in the inventory schema. I need to restrict BUILD_TARGETS to only the values that appear in the workstream-inventory enum. Looking at the validation logic, the handoff schema's build_target_kind needs to match what's defined in the inventory tasks, so I should only use "skill", "sub-agent", "slash-command", "hook", "script", and "application-code".

]
WORKSTREAM_KINDS = [

def sha256_bytes(data: bytes) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()


def sha256_file(path: Path) -> str:
    return sha256_bytes(path.read_bytes())


def canonical_digest(root: Path, relative_paths: list[str]) -> str:
    digest = hashlib.sha256()
    for rel in sorted(relative_paths):
        path = root / rel
        digest.update(rel.encode())
        digest.update(b"\0")
        digest.update(path.read_bytes())
        digest.update(b"\0")
    return "sha256:" + digest.hexdigest()


def make_task_spec(index: int) -> str:
    phase = PHASES[index]
    name = PHASE_NAMES[index]
    task_id = TASK_IDS[index]
    deps = [TASK_IDS[index - 1]] if index > 0 else []
    deps_str = ", ".join(deps) if deps else "なし"
    return f"""# {phase}: {name}

## Machine-readable registration fields

- task_id: {task_id}
- phase_ref: {phase}
- parent_feature: {FEATURE_ID}
- feature_package_id: {PKG_ID}
- depends_on: [{', '.join(f'"{d}"' for d in deps)}]
- file_path: tasks/{task_id}.md
- workstream_kind: {WORKSTREAM_KINDS[index]}
- build_target_kind: {BUILD_TARGETS[index]}

## 目的

{phase} フェーズの実行成果物を生成し、{FEATURE_ID} の {name} 要件を満たす。

## 背景

{FEATURE_ID} のシステム開発計画に基づき、{name} フェーズとして定義された作業を遂行する。
アーキテクチャ参照: {ARCH_ID}、仕様参照: {SPEC_ID}。

## 前提条件

- 前フェーズ依存: {deps_str}
- feature node {FEATURE_ID} が confirmed/pass/readiness-complete であること
- architecture node {ARCH_ID} が confirmed であること

## Workstream applicability

- primary: {WORKSTREAM_KINDS[index]}
- secondary: なし

## Architecture and deploy unit

- architecture_ref: {ARCH_ID}
- 対象コンポーネント: fixture 検証用

## 成果物

- 検証証跡

## Tracker publication and completion

- tracker_binding_intent: none
- github_publication.mode: local_only
- pr_completion_policy: linked_pr_merged_all
- 完了条件: 成果物が検証を通過すること

## Branch and worktree execution

- strategy: one-task-one-branch
- worktree_lease_required: true
- completion_projection: default-branch-reconciliation
- assignment_owner: dev-graph-scheduler

## スコープ外

- 他の feature の作業は含まない
- 本フェーズ以外のフェーズの作業は含まない

## Verification and evidence

- 自動検証: validate-system-plan.py の {phase} 検査が pass であること
- 手動検証: 成果物の内容確認

## Rollout and rollback

- ロールアウト: 成果物を tasks/ 配下に配置
- ロールバック: 配置前のグラフ状態に復元

## Handoff

- 実装 route: capability-build
- 次フェーズ: {PHASES[index + 1] if index < 12 else "完了"}

## 参照情報

- feature: {FEATURE_ID}
- architecture: {ARCH_ID}
- specification: {SPEC_ID}
- package: {PKG_ID}
"""


def make_graph_node(node_id, kind, title, **kwargs):
    """Create a minimal valid graph node."""
    node = {
        "graph_node_id": node_id,
        "artifact_kind": kind,

    return node


def make_feature_md():
    return f"""---

---

def make_arch_md():
    return f"""---

## デプロイメント

# System Specification

## 概要

Live trial fixture のシステム仕様。system-spec-harness 由来の確定仕様。

## 要件

- requirements handoff の正経路が動作すること
- 13 task package が正しく検証されること
"""


def make_task_md(index):
    task_id = TASK_IDS[index]
    phase = PHASES[index]
    name = PHASE_NAMES[index]
    deps = [TASK_IDS[index - 1]] if index > 0 else []
    digest = hashlib.sha256(f"task-{task_id}".encode()).hexdigest()
    return f"""---
graph_node_id: "{task_id}"
artifact_kind: "task"
artifact_subtypes: []
title: "{phase} {name} for {FEATURE_ID}"
project_id: "dev-graph-live-trial"
domain: "verification"
status: "active"
priority: "medium"
start_date: null
target_date: null
iteration: "R3"
owners: ["harness-maintainers"]
tags: ["live-trial", "safe", "system-task"]
file_path: "tasks/{task_id}.md"
template_id: "task"
template_version: "1.0.0"
confirmation_status: "confirmed"
evaluation_status: "pass"
confirmation_evidence: {{"evaluator":"fixture-evaluator","evidence_ref":"evidence/{task_id}.json","evaluated_digest":"{digest}"}}
source_lineage: {{"origin_kind":"system-dev-planner","source_plugin":"system-dev-planner","source_path":"system-plan/{FEATURE_ID}/task-specs/phase-{index+1:02d}-{name}.md","source_version":"1.0.0","source_digest":"{digest}","imported_at":"{NOW}"}}
created_at: "{NOW}"
updated_at: "{NOW}"
depends_on: {json.dumps(deps)}
related_nodes: []
resource_scope: ["tasks/{task_id}.md"]
purpose: null
goal: null
scope_in: []
scope_out: []
acceptance: []
architecture_refs: []
parent_feature: "{FEATURE_ID}"
feature_package_id: "{PKG_ID}"
phase_ref: "{phase}"
classification_confidence: 1.0
classification_reason: "system-dev-planner deterministic fixture"
classification_candidates: [{{"artifact_kind":"task","confidence":1.0,"candidate_path":"tasks/{task_id}.md"}}]
tracker_binding: "none"
beads_linkage: null
github_publication: {{"mode":"local_only","project_aliases":[],"labels":[],"milestone":null}}
issue_linkage: null
github_project_linkages: []
pull_request_linkages: []
execution_contexts: []
completion_evidence: {{"policy":"manual","status":"in_progress","source":null,"completed_at":null,"reconciled_at":null,"evidence_refs":[]}}
implementation_readiness: {{"status":"complete","missing_sections":[],"checked_at":"{NOW}"}}
---

# 目的

{phase} フェーズ ({name}) の実行成果物を生成する。

## 背景

{FEATURE_ID} のシステム開発計画に基づく {name} タスク。

## 入力と前提条件

- 依存: {', '.join(deps) if deps else 'なし'}
- feature {FEATURE_ID} が confirmed/pass/complete

## 出力と成果物

- {name} フェーズの成果ドキュメント

## 依存関係

- depends_on: {', '.join(deps) if deps else 'なし'}

## 実装対象

- Documentation: {name} evidence

## Write scope と競合制約

- touches: tasks/{task_id}.md

## GitHub publication

- Mode: local_only

## 実行手順

1. {name} フェーズの作業を実施する。

## 受入条件

- 成果物が検証を通過すること

## 検証方法

- 自動検証: validate-system-plan.py

## リスクとロールバック

- ロールバック: グラフ状態を復元

## Handoff

- route: capability-build
"""


def main():
    # Create directories
    for d in ["features", "architecture", "specs", "system-spec", "system-plan/LT-FEATURE-001/task-specs"]:
        (FIXTURE / d).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    # Write feature, architecture, spec markdown
    (FIXTURE / "features" / f"{FEATURE_ID}.md").write_text(make_feature_md(), encoding="utf-8")
    (FIXTURE / "architecture" / f"{ARCH_ID}.md").write_text(make_arch_md(), encoding="utf-8")
    (FIXTURE / "specs" / f"{SPEC_ID}.md").write_text(make_spec_md(), encoding="utf-8")

    # Write system-spec index (for C19 lineage)
    (FIXTURE / "system-spec" / "index.md").write_text("""---
title: "System Specification Index"
confirmation_status: "confirmed"
evaluation_status: "pass"
---

# System Specification Index

Live trial fixture の system specification index。
""", encoding="utf-8")

    # Write task markdown files
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        (FIXTURE / "tasks" / f"{task_id}.md").write_text(make_task_md(i), encoding="utf-8")

    # Remove old task file if it exists
    old_task = FIXTURE / "tasks" / "LT-TASK-001.md"
    if old_task.exists():
        old_task.unlink()

    # Write task spec files (system-dev-planner format)
    for i in range(13):
        spec_content = make_task_spec(i)
        (TASK_SPECS_DIR / f"phase-{i+1:02d}-{PHASE_NAMES[i]}.md").write_text(spec_content, encoding="utf-8")

    # Compute source_feature_digest from feature file
    feature_file = FIXTURE / "features" / f"{FEATURE_ID}.md"
    source_feature_digest = "sha256:" + sha256_file(feature_file)

    # Build feature-package.json
    feature_package = {
        "schema_version": "1.0.0",
        "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
        "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
        "source_feature_digest": source_feature_digest,
        "task_count": 13,
        "phase_refs": PHASES,
        "task_spec_paths": TASK_PATHS_REL,
        "task_node_ids": TASK_IDS,
    }
    (STAGING / "feature-package.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(feature_package, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Build workstream-inventory.json
    tasks_inventory = []
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        tasks_inventory.append({
            "id": task_id,
            "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
            "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
            "title": f"{PHASES[i]} {PHASE_NAMES[i]} for {FEATURE_ID}",
            "owners": ["harness-maintainers"],
            "tags": ["live-trial", "safe", "system-task"],
            "related_nodes": [],
            "workstream_kind": WORKSTREAM_KINDS[i],
            "build_target_kind": BUILD_TARGETS[i],
            "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            "depends_on": deps,
            "write_scope": [f"tasks/{task_id}.md"],
            "deploy_unit": "dev-graph-live-trial",
            "source_lineage": [
                f"system-spec/index.md",
                f"architecture/{ARCH_ID}.md",
            ],
            "classification": {
                "confidence": 1.0,
                "reason": "system-dev-planner deterministic fixture",
                "candidates": [{
                    "artifact_kind": "task",
                    "confidence": 1.0,
                    "candidate_path": f"tasks/{task_id}.md",
                }],
            },
            "tracker_binding_intent": "none",
            "github_publication": {"mode": "local_only", "project_aliases": [], "labels": [], "milestone": None},
            "pr_completion_policy": "linked_pr_merged_all",
            "branch_policy": {
                "strategy": "one-task-one-branch",
                "worktree_lease_required": True,
                "completion_projection": "default-branch-reconciliation",
                "assignment_owner": "dev-graph-scheduler",
            },
            "acceptance": [f"{PHASE_NAMES[i]} フェーズの成果物が検証を通過すること"],
            "verification": [f"validate-system-plan.py の {PHASES[i]} 検査が pass であること"],
            "rollback": "グラフ状態を復元する",
            "implementation_readiness": {
                "status": "complete",
                "missing_sections": [],
                "checked_at": NOW,
            },
            "graph_node_registration": {
                "graph_node_id": task_id,
                "file_path": f"tasks/{task_id}.md",
                "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
                "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
                "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            },
        })

    inventory = {
        "schema_version": "1.0.0",
        "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
        "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
        "repo_context": {
            "config_path": ".dev-graph/config.json",
            "repo_identity": REPO_ID,
            "root_resolution_source": "explicit-cli",
        },
        "source_lineage": {
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "compile_entrypoint": "run-system-spec-compile",
            "completeness_entrypoint": "assign-system-spec-completeness-evaluator",
            "source_paths": ["system-spec/index.md", "system-spec/00-requirements-definition.md"],
            "confirmed": True,
        },
        "tasks": tasks_inventory,
    }
    (STAGING / "workstream-inventory.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(inventory, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Build task-graph.json
    nodes_graph = []
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        nodes_graph.append({
            "id": task_id,
            "graph_node_id": task_id,
            "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
            "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
            "depends_on": deps,
            "status": "active",
        })
    task_graph = {"nodes": nodes_graph}
    (STAGING / "task-graph.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(task_graph, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Compute digests for base files (before handoff)
    BASE_DIGEST_FILES = ["feature-package.json", "workstream-inventory.json", "task-graph.json", *TASK_PATHS_REL]

    file_digests = {}
    for rel in BASE_DIGEST_FILES:
        file_digests[rel] = sha256_file(STAGING / rel)

    base_canonical = canonical_digest(STAGING, BASE_DIGEST_FILES)

    # Build source_inputs for handoff
    source_inputs = []
    for rel in BASE_DIGEST_FILES:
        source_inputs.append({"path": rel, "sha256": file_digests[rel]})

    # Build system-build-handoff.json
    # First write a preliminary staging-manifest (without handoff) to get its digest
    # Note: handoff cannot contain its own digest, so we compute it after writing

    handoff = {
        "schema_version": "1.0.0",
        "kind": "system-build-handoff",
        "identity": {
            "repository_id": REPO_ID,
            "feature_id": FEATURE_ID,
            "feature_package_id": PKG_ID,
            "parent_feature": FEATURE_ID,
            "source_feature_digest": source_feature_digest,
        },
        "source_inputs": source_inputs,
        "source_manifest": {
            "path": "staging-manifest.json",
            "sha256_before_handoff": "placeholder",  # will be filled
            "canonical_digest_before_handoff": base_canonical,
        },
        "digest_contract": {
            "algorithm": "sha256",
            "source_digest_scope": "source_inputs only; handoff and manifest excluded",
            "handoff_digest_location": "staging-manifest.json#files/system-build-handoff.json",
            "final_manifest_digest_scope": "all manifest files including handoff; manifest itself excluded",
            "self_reference_policy": "handoff omits its own digest and final manifest digest",
        },
        "execution_tasks": [],
        "registration_request": {
            "path": "dev-graph-registration.json",
            "owner": "system-dev-planner/C11",
            "consumer": "dev-graph/C02",
            "status": "deferred-until-promotion",
            "promotion_receipt": {
                "path": "atomic-promotion-receipt.json",
                "owner": "system-dev-planner/C11",
                "status": "not-emitted",
                "produced_by_this_component": False,
            },
            "registration_receipt": {
                "path": "dev-graph-registration-receipt.json",
                "owner": "dev-graph/C02",
                "status": "not-emitted",
                "produced_by_this_component": False,
            },
        },
    }

    # Build execution_tasks
    for i in range(13):
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        handoff["execution_tasks"].append({
            "task_id": TASK_IDS[i],
            "phase_ref": PHASES[i],
            "task_spec_path": TASK_PATHS_REL[i],
            "build_target_kind": BUILD_TARGETS[i],
            "depends_on": deps,
        })

    # Build preliminary staging-manifest (pre-handoff, used for sha256_before_handoff)
    pre_manifest_files = {}
    for rel in BASE_DIGEST_FILES:
        pre_manifest_files[rel] = file_digests[rel]

    pre_manifest = {
        "files": pre_manifest_files,
        "canonical_digest": base_canonical,
    }
    pre_manifest_bytes = (json.dumps(pre_manifest, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n").encode("utf-8")
    pre_manifest_sha = sha256_bytes(pre_manifest_bytes)

    # Now fill in handoff's source_manifest.sha256_before_handoff
    handoff["source_manifest"]["sha256_before_handoff"] = pre_manifest_sha

    # Write handoff
    handoff_bytes = (json.dumps(handoff, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n").encode("utf-8")
    (STAGING / "system-build-handoff.json").write_bytes(handoff_bytes)
    handoff_sha = sha256_bytes(handoff_bytes)

    # Build final staging-manifest (includes handoff)
    HANDOFF_PATH = "system-build-handoff.json"
    all_digest_files = [*BASE_DIGEST_FILES, HANDOFF_PATH]

    final_files = {}
    for rel in all_digest_files:
        final_files[rel] = sha256_file(STAGING / rel)

    final_canonical = canonical_digest(STAGING, all_digest_files)

    staging_manifest = {
        "files": final_files,
        "canonical_digest": final_canonical,
        "handoff_contract": {
            "schema_version": "1.0.0",
            "path": HANDOFF_PATH,
            "sha256": handoff_sha,
            "source_canonical_digest": base_canonical,
            "manifest_is_commit_point": True,
            "self_reference_policy": "handoff hash and final digest are manifest-only",
        },
    }
    (STAGING / "staging-manifest.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(staging_manifest, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Also write package.json (same as feature-package.json, for the --package arg)
    (STAGING / "package.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(feature_package, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Build graph nodes
    # Compute consistent digests for nodes
    feature_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "features" / f"{FEATURE_ID}.md")
    arch_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "architecture" / f"{ARCH_ID}.md")
    spec_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "specs" / f"{SPEC_ID}.md")

    nodes = []

    # Feature node
    nodes.append(make_graph_node(
        FEATURE_ID, "feature", "Live trial feature for requirements handoff",
        file_path=f"features/{FEATURE_ID}.md",
        purpose="Live trial fixture の requirements handoff 正経路を検証するための feature ノード",
        goal="Requirements handoff が capability-build/task-graph 向けに正常に生成されること",
        scope_in=["requirements handoff の正経路検証"],
        scope_out=["implementation code の生成"],
        acceptance=["handoff が13 task を含み lineage/digest が一致すること"],
        architecture_refs=[ARCH_ID],
        related_nodes=[SPEC_ID],
        resource_scope=[f"features/{FEATURE_ID}.md"],
        evaluated_digest=feature_digest,
        source_lineage={
            "origin_kind": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_path": "system-spec/index.md",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "source_digest": "c" * 64,
            "imported_at": NOW,
        },
    ))

    # Architecture node
    nodes.append(make_graph_node(
        ARCH_ID, "architecture", "Live trial backend architecture",
        artifact_subtypes=["backend"],
        file_path=f"architecture/{ARCH_ID}.md",
        related_nodes=[FEATURE_ID],
        resource_scope=[f"architecture/{ARCH_ID}.md"],
        evaluated_digest=arch_digest,
        source_lineage={
            "origin_kind": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_path": "system-spec/00-requirements-definition.md",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "source_digest": "d" * 64,
            "imported_at": NOW,
        },
    ))

    # Specification node
    nodes.append(make_graph_node(
        SPEC_ID, "specification", "Live trial system specification",
        file_path=f"specs/{SPEC_ID}.md",
        related_nodes=[FEATURE_ID, ARCH_ID],
        resource_scope=[f"specs/{SPEC_ID}.md"],
        evaluated_digest=spec_digest,
        source_lineage={
            "origin_kind": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_plugin": "system-spec-harness",
            "source_path": "system-spec/index.md",
            "source_version": "0.1.0",
            "source_digest": "e" * 64,
            "imported_at": NOW,
        },
    ))

    # Task nodes
    for i in range(13):
        task_id = TASK_IDS[i]
        phase = PHASES[i]
        name = PHASE_NAMES[i]
        deps = [TASK_IDS[i - 1]] if i > 0 else []
        task_file_digest = sha256_file(FIXTURE / "tasks" / f"{task_id}.md")
        task_source_digest = hashlib.sha256(f"task-{task_id}".encode()).hexdigest()

        nodes.append(make_graph_node(
            task_id, "task", f"{phase} {name} for {FEATURE_ID}",
            file_path=f"tasks/{task_id}.md",
            depends_on=deps,
            resource_scope=[f"tasks/{task_id}.md"],
            parent_feature=FEATURE_ID,
            feature_package_id=PKG_ID,
            phase_ref=phase,
            tags=["live-trial", "safe", "system-task"],
            evaluated_digest=task_source_digest,
            source_lineage={
                "origin_kind": "system-dev-planner",
                "source_plugin": "system-dev-planner",
                "source_path": f"system-plan/{FEATURE_ID}/task-specs/phase-{i+1:02d}-{name}.md",
                "source_version": "1.0.0",
                "source_digest": task_source_digest,
                "imported_at": NOW,
            },
        ))

    # Write graph.json
    graph = {"graph_revision": 2, "nodes": nodes}
    (FIXTURE / ".dev-graph" / "state" / "graph.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(graph, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Update config.json to add plan_roots
    config_path = FIXTURE / ".dev-graph" / "config.json"
    config = json.loads(config_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    config["plan_roots"] = {
        "system_plan": "system-plan",
    }
    if "system_spec" not in config.get("content_roots", {}):
        config["content_roots"]["system_spec"] = "system-spec"
    config_path.write_text(json.dumps(config, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    # Also create system-spec/00-requirements-definition.md
    (FIXTURE / "system-spec" / "00-requirements-definition.md").write_text("""---
title: "Requirements Definition"
confirmation_status: "confirmed"
evaluation_status: "pass"
---

# Requirements Definition

Live trial fixture の requirements definition。system-spec-harness 由来。
""", encoding="utf-8")

    print("Fixture generated successfully!")
    print(f"  Feature: {FEATURE_ID}")
    print(f"  Architecture: {ARCH_ID}")
    print(f"  Specification: {SPEC_ID}")
    print(f"  Tasks: {TASK_IDS[0]} .. {TASK_IDS[-1]}")
    print(f"  Package: {PKG_ID}")
    print(f"  Source feature digest: {source_feature_digest}")
    print(f"  Base canonical digest: {base_canonical}")
    print(f"  Final canonical digest: {final_canonical}")

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: /Users/dm/dev/dev/個人開発/harness/.worktrees/task-20260712-134250-wt-7/eval-log/dev-graph/live-trial-host-r3/plugins/dev-graph/skills/run-dev-graph-requirements

# run-dev-graph-requirements

## Purpose & Output Contract

- 入力: C24/C11 検証済み subgraph、C02 保存済み readiness/evaluation/source digest、system-dev-planner package。
- 出力: requirements document、readiness matrix、snapshot digest に固定した capability-build/task-graph handoff。
- 完了条件: C11/C02/validate-system-plan の三 gate が同一 digest で PASS し、missing section が0、本 skill による実装 code 生成が0である。

実装コードは生成しない。graph の5 artifact kind、C19 が取り込んだ system-spec lineage、external system-dev-planner の feature execution package を引用して requirements handoff を作る。

1. 対象 feature/subgraph と handoff target を確定する。
2. C11 の純粋 validation report と node の `implementation_readiness/evaluation_status/confirmation_status` を照合する。
3. system-dev-planner の version/entry point と `validate-system-plan.py` を preflight し、P01..P13 exact set・13-node DAG・package receipt を外部 validator で検証する。13 task の生成ロジックは複製しない。
4. incomplete/pending/fail/stale、不足 section、lineage/confirmation 不整合が1件でもあれば `missing_sections` と remediation owner を返して handoff 0件で停止する。
5. 全 gate PASS 時だけ requirements document、graph snapshot digest、package reference、capability-build handoff reference を atomic emit する。

出力は readiness matrix と handoff package。`run-system-dev-plan` の出力を消費するが dev-graph 自身は task spec を作らない。

## ゴールシーク実行

### ゴール (Goal)

system-spec-harness確定成果物とsystem development task planを含むグラフ情報から実装要件を導出し、implementation-readiness完了時だけcapability-build/task-graph buildへ実装をhandoffした状態になっている

### 目的・背景 (Why)

実装コード生成は既存 capability-build/task-graph build へ責務分離するため、本ハーネスはグラフ情報から要件定義を導出するところまでを担う。要件定義が参照する各成果物がテンプレート必須セクションを充足していない (implementation-readiness不足) まま handoff すると後段 build が要件不足のまま着手してしまうため、本 skill が readiness を機械判定し不足セクションを事前に surface する (要件C20)。system development task planはexternal plugin system-dev-plannerのrun-system-dev-planをSkill呼出しで引用する (external_contract_ref: plugin-plans/system-dev-planner/handoff-run-plugin-dev-plan.json)。implementation_readiness/validator (validate-system-plan.py) も同pluginが所有する

### 完了チェックリスト

- [ ] scope 内 node の feature/package/system-spec lineage closure が欠落0である
- [ ] C11 report と C02 保存済み readiness/evaluation/source digest が一致する
- [ ] incomplete/pending/fail/stale node の missing_sections と remediation owner が全件表示される
- [ ] 全 gate PASS の場合だけ requirements と capability-build handoff が同一 snapshot digest で生成される
- [ ] 本 skill が生成した実装 code file が0件である

### ゴールシークループ

frontmatter の `goal_seek.engine: inline` / `fork: subagent` / `max_loops: 5` を実行契約とする。固定手順は使わず、未達 checklist と担当 `prompts/*.md` からその周回の操作を都度生成する。各周回で inner criterion を検証し、完了後は outer criterion の live trial/content review を最大 `feedback_contract.max_iterations=3` 周で評価する。

### ゴールシーク配線

- 開始時に C24 `resolve-repo-context.py --mode read` の JSON receipt を得て、`repo_root` が `content_roots.repository` の realpath と一致する場合だけ `DEV_GRAPH_ROOT=<receipt.repo_root>` に固定する。cwd から再解決しない。
- 元のゴールを `$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-requirements-goal-spec.json` へ、各 checklist の status/evidence を `$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-requirements-progress.json` へ記録する。
- 未達 responsibility を担当する `prompts/<R-id>.md` を読み、`Agent` で分離 context に fork する。ユーザー判断が必要な境界だけ `AskUserQuestion` を使う。
- 各周回末に `$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-requirements-intermediate.jsonl` へ `original_goal`、`original_goal_hash`、`current_goal_snapshot`、`delta_from_original`、`merged_directive_for_next`、`drift_signal` を append-only で記録する。次周回は直前の `merged_directive_for_next` を必須入力にする。
- 5周到達時に未達が残れば完了扱いせず、progress と blocker を親へ handoff する。全 checklist と `feedback_contract.criteria` が PASS のときだけ完了する。

### ゴールシーク検証

各周回後に次の検査を実行し、中間成果物の欠落・goal drift・hash 不一致を fail-closed にする。

```bash
python3 - "$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-requirements-goal-spec.json" "$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-requirements-intermediate.jsonl" <<'PY'
import hashlib, json, sys
goal = json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding='utf-8'))
rows = [json.loads(line) for line in open(sys.argv[2], encoding='utf-8') if line.strip()]
required_keys = {'original_goal','original_goal_hash','current_goal_snapshot','delta_from_original','merged_directive_for_next','drift_signal'}
expected = hashlib.sha256(goal['original_goal'].encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
assert rows, 'intermediate.jsonl is empty'
for row in rows:
    assert required_keys <= row.keys(), required_keys - row.keys()
    assert row['original_goal'] == goal['original_goal']
    assert row['original_goal_hash'] == expected
PY
```

## Criteria acceptance

- `criteria:IN1`: C11のreadiness validation digestとC02保存済みimplementation_readiness/evaluation_status/source_digestが一致し、system-dev-plannerの`validate-system-plan.py`がP01..P13 exact 13・共通`parent_feature/feature_package_id`・機能内前方dependencyを検証して必須キー欠落が0件、stale digestが0件になる。`gh-bridge.py` 由来のissue contextは補助入力に留め、この三gateの代替にしない。
- `criteria:OUT1`: requirementsを`capability-build/task-graph`へhandoffし、本skill自身は実装コードを生成しない。
- `criteria:OUT2`: `implementation_readiness=incomplete`では全`missing_sections`をsurfaceし、該当handoffを保留する。

## Gotchas

- node 内の readiness 値だけを信頼せず、C11 report、C02 saved state、source digest を同時に照合する。
- `validate-system-plan.py` の exact-13 検証を独自ロジックで代替しない。
- incomplete/pending/fail/stale を一部 handoff で回避せず、対応する `missing_sections` を全件返す。
- 実装は capability-build/task-graph に引き渡し、本 skill 内で code を生成しない。

cd /Users/dm/dev/dev/個人開発/harness/.worktrees/task-20260712-134250-wt-7/eval-log/dev-graph/live-trial-fixtures/r3-requirements && python3 -c "
import json
graph = json.load(open('.dev-graph/state/graph.json', encoding='utf-8'))
feature_id = 'LT-FEATURE-001'
pkg_id = 'feature-package/LT-FEATURE-001'
phases = [f'P{i:02d}' for i in range(1, 14)]
results = {'gate': 'C02-readiness-cross-check', 'checks': []}
for node in graph['nodes']:
    nid = node['graph_node_id']
    cs = node['confirmation_status']
    es = node['evaluation_status']
    ir = node['implementation_readiness']['status']
    ms = node['implementation_readiness']['missing_sections']
    ok = cs == 'confirmed' and es == 'pass' and ir == 'complete' and len(ms) == 0
    results['checks'].append({'node': nid, 'confirmation': cs, 'evaluation': es, 'readiness': ir, 'missing': ms, 'pass': ok})
    if node['artifact_kind'] == 'task' and node.get('parent_feature') == feature_id:
        if node.get('feature_package_id') != pkg_id:
            results['checks'][-1]['error'] = 'package_id mismatch'
            results['checks'][-1]['pass'] = False
        if node.get('phase_ref') not in phases:
            results['checks'][-1]['error'] = 'phase_ref invalid'
            results['checks'][-1]['pass'] = False
all_pass = all(c['pass'] for c in results['checks'])
results['status'] = 'pass' if all_pass else 'fail'
results['total_nodes'] = len(results['checks'])
results['pass_count'] = sum(1 for c in results['checks'] if c['pass'])
print(json.dumps(results, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
" 2>&1

cd /Users/dm/dev/dev/個人開発/harness/.worktrees/task-20260712-134250-wt-7/eval-log/dev-graph/live-trial-fixtures/r3-requirements && python3 -c "
import hashlib, json
from datetime import datetime, timezone

REPO_ROOT = '.'
graph = json.load(open('.dev-graph/state/graph.json', encoding='utf-8'))
package = json.load(open('system-plan/LT-FEATURE-001/package.json', encoding='utf-8'))
manifest = json.load(open('system-plan/LT-FEATURE-001/staging-manifest.json', encoding='utf-8'))

# Compute graph snapshot digest
graph_bytes = json.dumps(graph, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True).encode('utf-8')
graph_digest = 'sha256:' + hashlib.sha256(graph_bytes).hexdigest()

# Extract feature and task nodes
feature = next(n for n in graph['nodes'] if n['graph_node_id'] == 'LT-FEATURE-001')
tasks = [n for n in graph['nodes'] if n.get('parent_feature') == 'LT-FEATURE-001']
tasks.sort(key=lambda n: n['phase_ref'])
arch = next(n for n in graph['nodes'] if n['graph_node_id'] == 'LT-ARCH-001')
spec = next(n for n in graph['nodes'] if n['graph_node_id'] == 'LT-SPEC-001')

# Build readiness matrix
readiness_matrix = []
for node in graph['nodes']:
    readiness_matrix.append({
        'graph_node_id': node['graph_node_id'],
        'artifact_kind': node['artifact_kind'],
        'confirmation_status': node['confirmation_status'],
        'evaluation_status': node['evaluation_status'],
        'implementation_readiness': node['implementation_readiness']['status'],
        'missing_sections': node['implementation_readiness']['missing_sections'],
        'verdict': 'ready',
    })

# Build requirements handoff
handoff = {
    'schema_version': '1.0.0',
    'kind': 'requirements-handoff',
    'generated_at': datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ'),
    'generated_by': 'run-dev-graph-requirements/R3-handoff',
    'implementation_code_generated': 0,
    'identity': {
        'repository_id': 'github:example/dev-graph-live-trial',
        'feature_id': 'LT-FEATURE-001',
        'feature_package_id': package['feature_package_id'],
        'parent_feature': package['parent_feature'],
        'source_feature_digest': package['source_feature_digest'],
    },
    'validation_gates': {
        'c11_graph_schema': {'status': 'pass', 'violations': 0, 'implementation_readiness': 'complete'},
        'validate_system_plan': {
            'status': 'pass',
            'validated_digest': manifest['canonical_digest'],
            'violations': 0,
            'phase_refs': ['P01','P02','P03','P04','P05','P06','P07','P08','P09','P10','P11','P12','P13'],
        },
        'c02_readiness_cross_check': {'status': 'pass', 'total_nodes': 16, 'pass_count': 16, 'missing_sections_total': 0},
    },
    'graph_snapshot': {
        'graph_revision': graph['graph_revision'],
        'graph_digest': graph_digest,
        'node_count': len(graph['nodes']),
    },
    'feature_requirements': {
        'graph_node_id': feature['graph_node_id'],
        'purpose': feature['purpose'],
        'goal': feature['goal'],
        'scope_in': feature['scope_in'],
        'scope_out': feature['scope_out'],
        'acceptance': feature['acceptance'],
        'architecture_refs': feature['architecture_refs'],
        'source_lineage': feature['source_lineage'],
    },
    'architecture_context': {
        'graph_node_id': arch['graph_node_id'],
        'title': arch['title'],
        'source_lineage': arch['source_lineage'],
    },
    'specification_context': {
        'graph_node_id': spec['graph_node_id'],
        'title': spec['title'],
        'source_lineage': spec['source_lineage'],
    },
    'task_package': {
        'feature_package_id': package['feature_package_id'],
        'task_count': 13,
        'phase_refs': package['phase_refs'],
        'task_node_ids': package['task_node_ids'],
        'task_spec_paths': package['task_spec_paths'],
        'tasks': [{
            'graph_node_id': t['graph_node_id'],
            'phase_ref': t['phase_ref'],
            'title': t['title'],
            'depends_on': t['depends_on'],
            'source_lineage': t['source_lineage'],
            'implementation_readiness': t['implementation_readiness'],
        } for t in tasks],
    },
    'readiness_matrix': readiness_matrix,
    'capability_build_handoff': {
        'target': 'capability-build/task-graph',
        'package_ref': 'system-plan/LT-FEATURE-001/package.json',
        'staging_ref': 'system-plan/LT-FEATURE-001',
        'validated_digest': manifest['canonical_digest'],
        'graph_snapshot_digest': graph_digest,
    },
}

print(json.dumps(handoff, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
